Leave-one-out (LOO) pool quality = mean teammate **minutes** excluding self.\\n- **&#96;ppm&#96;** — Points per minute from box. LOO = mean teammate **PPM** excluding self.\\n\\n**Sports Reference** (needs &#96;DO_NOT_ERASE/bpm_player_season_matched.csv&#96; on the panel)\\n\\n- **&#96;bpm&#96;** — Box Plus/Minus; SR all-in-one advanced impact statistic.\\n- **&#96;obpm&#96;** / **&#96;opm&#96;** — Offensive BPM (same matched row as BPM).\\n- **&#96;dbpm&#96;** / **&#96;dpm&#96;** — Defensive BPM.\\n- **&#96;per&#96;** — Player efficiency rating; composite efficiency index.\\n- **&#96;ws40&#96;** — Win shares **per 40 minutes** (rate).\\n- **&#96;ws&#96;** — Win **shares** (season total at the matched row).\\n- **&#96;tspct&#96;** or **&#96;ts_pct&#96;** — True shooting **percentage** from SR (panel column &#96;ts_pct_sr&#96;).\\n\\n**&#96;perf_zscore_within_season&#96;** — If &#96;True&#96;, &#96;perf&#96; is replaced by its **z-score within each collegiate season** before LOO. Then &#96;poolq_loo&#96; is in **within-season SD units** (useful for comparing metrics or multi-metric plots later).\\n\\n**Export filenames** — Figures and CSVs under &#96;CFG.exports_dir&#96; include a slug from &#96;perf_metric&#96; plus &#96;_zwithinseason&#96; when z-scoring is on, e.g. &#96;inverted_u_ventiles_dbpm_2026-04-01.png&#96; vs &#96;dataset_coverage_dashboard_obpm_zwithinseason_2026-04-01.png&#96;, so each PowerPoint slide can match a distinct file.\"}}"
```json
}
```
Status: **completed**


</details>
</tool-use>

```python
# CELL 4 — run full 530 pipeline (panel → perf/LOO → integrity → coverage → ventiles → LPM)
# RUN_ALL_PERF_METRICS: True = one panel build, then every row in perf_metric.perf_options_df()
#   ("metric" column); skips metrics whose source column is missing on the panel.
# False = single run using CFG.perf_metric only (same as before).
from dataclasses import replace

RUN_ALL_PERF_METRICS = True

if RUN_ALL_PERF_METRICS:
    if CFG.run_stage3_status:
        print("--- Stage 3 status (stubs / optional scrape) ---")
        print(ingest_box.run(CFG))
        print(draft_match.run(CFG))
        print(sr_bpm.run(CFG))
        print()
    panel_base = conductor.prepare_panel(CFG)
    metrics = perf_metric.perf_options_df()["metric"].tolist()
    OUT_BY_METRIC = {}
    skipped = []
    for m in metrics:
        if not conductor.panel_has_metric_column(panel_base, m):
            skipped.append(m)
            continue
        print(f"\n========== perf_metric={m!r} ==========\n")
        cfg_m = replace(CFG, perf_metric=m)
        OUT_BY_METRIC[m] = conductor.run_conductor_from_panel(cfg_m, panel_base.copy(deep=True))
    if skipped:
        print(f"--- Skipped (missing panel column): {skipped} ---")
    OUT = OUT_BY_METRIC
    PANEL = OUT_BY_METRIC[next(iter(OUT_BY_METRIC))]["PANEL"] if OUT_BY_METRIC else None
```

<tool-use data-tool-type="unknown" data-tool-name="mcp-notebook_mcp-user-notebook_mcp-notebook_edit_cell">
<details>
<summary>Tool use: **mcp-notebook_mcp-user-notebook_mcp-notebook_edit_cell**</summary>


Parameters:

```json
{
  "tools": [
    {
      "name": "notebook_edit_cell",
      "parameters": "{\"notebook_path\":\"530_sports_pipeline.ipynb\",\"cell_index\":7,\"source\":\"# CELL 4 — run full 530 pipeline (panel → perf/LOO → integrity → coverage → ventiles → LPM)\\n#\\n# RUN_ALL_PERF_METRICS: True = build/refresh the panel once, then run analysis for every\\n#   user key in perf_metric.perf_options_df()[\\\"metric\\\"] (each export slug differs).\\n#   Metrics whose source column is missing on the panel are skipped with a message.\\n# False = single run using CFG.perf_metric (equivalent to conductor.run_conductor(CFG)).\\n#\\nfrom dataclasses import replace\\n\\nRUN_ALL_PERF_METRICS = True\\n\\nif RUN_ALL_PERF_METRICS:\\n    if CFG.run_stage3_status:\\n        print(\\\"--- Stage 3 status (stubs / optional scrape) ---\\\")\\n        print(ingest_box.run(CFG))\\n        print(draft_match.run(CFG))\\n        print(sr_bpm.run(CFG))\\n        print()\\n    panel_base = conductor.prepare_panel(CFG)\\n    metrics = perf_metric.perf_options_df()[\\\"metric\\\"].tolist()\\n    OUT_BY_METRIC = {}\\n    skipped = []\\n    for m in metrics:\\n        if not conductor.panel_has_metric_column(panel_base, m):\\n            skipped.append(m)\\n            continue\\n        print(f\\\"\\\\n========== perf_metric={m!r} ==========\\\\n\\\")\\n        cfg_m = replace(CFG, perf_metric=m)\\n        OUT_BY_METRIC[m] = conductor.run_conductor_from_panel(cfg_m, panel_base.copy(deep=True))\\n    if skipped:\\n        print(f\\\"--- Skipped (missing panel column): {skipped} ---\\\")\\n    OUT = OUT_BY_METRIC\\n    if OUT_BY_METRIC:\\n        PANEL = (\\n            OUT_BY_METRIC[CFG.perf_metric][\\\"PANEL\\\"]\\n            if CFG.perf_metric in OUT_BY_METRIC\\n            else list(OUT_BY_METRIC.values())[-1][\\\"PANEL\\\"]\\n        )\\n    else:\\n        PANEL = None\\nelse:\\n    OUT = conductor.run_conductor(CFG)\\n    PANEL = OUT[\\\"PANEL\\\"]\\n\\nPANEL.shape if PANEL is not None else None\"}",
      "serverName": "notebook_mcp"
    }
  ]
}
```

```json
}
```

Double-check: replace(CFG, perf_metric=m) triggers __post_init__ which calls resolve_perf_metric - good.

</details></think>

_**Agent (default)**_

Yes. Here is what was added.

### Behavior

- **`RUN_ALL_PERF_METRICS = True`** (CELL 4): **`prepare_panel(CFG)`** runs once (same work as before: load/rebuild + optional SR refresh). Then the notebook loops over **`perf_metric.perf_options_df()["metric"]`**, and for each key runs **`run_conductor_from_panel(replace(CFG, perf_metric=m), panel_base.copy(deep=True))`** so plots/CSVs keep distinct slugs without rebuilding the panel each time.
- **`RUN_ALL_PERF_METRICS = False`**: **`OUT = conductor.run_conductor(CFG)`** — same as the old one-shot cell.
- Metrics whose **source column is missing** on the panel are **skipped** (with a printed list), e.g. SR metrics before merge.
- **`OUT`** is a **`dict[str, dict]`** keyed by metric when looping (`OUT["obpm"]["ventile_png"]`, etc.). **`PANEL`** is **`CFG.perf_metric`**’s panel if that key ran, otherwise the **last** metric in the sweep.

### Code changes

- **`sports_pipeline/conductor.py`**: **`prepare_panel`**, **`run_conductor_from_panel`** (analysis-only path), **`panel_has_metric_column`**, and **`run_conductor`** refactored to call prepare + `run_conductor_from_panel`. Done lines now include **`perf_metric=`** in the summary print.

### Notebook

- CELL 4 documents the toggle, **`export_panel_after_run`** caveat (same default path overwritten each pass), and CELL 0 / CELL 2 comments point at **`RUN_ALL_PERF_METRICS`**.

Restart the kernel after pulling so **`conductor`** picks up the new API.

**Note:** `perf_options_df()` lists **every accepted user key** (`obpm` and `opm`, `dbpm` and `dpm`, `tspct` and `ts_pct`), so you get **separate exports** for each alias (different filenames). To sweep only one row per underlying column, you could later switch the loop to **`perf_options_df().drop_duplicates("panel_column")["metric"]`** or a hand-picked list.

```json
          {
            "lineNumber": 90,
            "text": "        w(f\"  - Distinct (athlete_id, season, team_id) in window: {len(pst):,}\\n\\n\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 91
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 92,
            "text": "    w(\"**Draft register (&#96;DO_NOT_ERASE/nbaplayersdraft.csv&#96;)**\\n\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 93,
            "text": "    p_reg = paths.nbaplayersdraft_csv()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 94,
            "text": "    if not p_reg.is_file():"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 95,
            "text": "        w(f\"- FILE MISSING: {p_reg}\\n\\n\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 96,
            "text": "    else:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 97,
            "text": "        reg = pd.read_csv(p_reg, low_memory=False)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 98,
            "text": "        ycol = \"year\" if \"year\" in reg.columns else None"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 99,
            "text": "        if ycol:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 100,
            "text": "            w("
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 101,
            "text": "                f\"- Rows: {len(reg):,}; draft &#96;year&#96; range: \""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 102,
            "text": "                f\"{int(reg[ycol].min())}–{int(reg[ycol].max())}\\n\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 103,
            "text": "            )"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 104,
            "text": "        else:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 105,
            "text": "            w(f\"- Rows: {len(reg):,} (no &#96;year&#96; column found)\\n\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 106,
            "text": "        w(\"\\n\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 107
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 108,
            "text": "    w(\"**Draft→athlete pipeline (&#96;draft_athlete_match.csv&#96;)**\\n\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 109,
            "text": "    p_m = paths.draft_athlete_match_csv()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 110,
            "text": "    if not p_m.is_file():"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 111,
            "text": "        w(f\"- FILE MISSING: {p_m}\\n\\n\")"
          }
        ],
        "range": {

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 121,
            "text": "def run_match("
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 122,
            "text": "    cfg: Any | None = None,"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 123,
            "text": "    *,"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 124,
            "text": "    panel: pd.DataFrame | None = None,"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 125,
            "text": "    raw_path: Path | None = None,"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 126,
            "text": "    crosswalk: pd.DataFrame | None = None,"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 127,
            "text": ") -\u003e dict[str, Any]:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 128,
            "text": "    \"\"\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 129,
            "text": "    Match &#96;&#96;bpm_player_season_raw&#96;&#96; rows onto panel rows; write matched + unmatched CSVs."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 130
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 131,
            "text": "    If &#96;&#96;panel&#96;&#96; is &#96;&#96;None&#96;&#96;, reads &#96;&#96;player_season_panel_530.csv&#96;&#96; (must include"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 132,
            "text": "    &#96;&#96;athlete_display_name&#96;&#96;). For a panel built only from box, pass the DataFrame from"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 133,
            "text": "    &#96;&#96;panel_rebuild.build_from_box&#96;&#96; instead."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 134,
            "text": "    \"\"\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 135,
            "text": "    _ = cfg"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 136,
            "text": "    panel_path = paths.panel_530_csv()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 137,
            "text": "    raw_p = raw_path or paths.bpm_raw_csv()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 138,
            "text": "    matched_out = paths.bpm_matched_csv()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 139,
            "text": "    unmatched_out = paths.bpm_panel_rows_unmatched_csv()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 140
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 141,
            "text": "    if panel is None:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 142,
            "text": "        if not panel_path.is_file():"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 143,
            "text": "            raise FileNotFoundError("
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 144,
            "text": "                f\"Missing {panel_path}. Pass panel=DataFrame from panel_rebuild.build_from_box, \""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 145,
            "text": "                \"or export a panel CSV with athlete_display_name.\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 146,
            "text": "            )"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 147,
            "text": "        panel_df = pd.read_csv(panel_path, low_memory=False)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 148,
            "text": "    else:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 149,
            "text": "        panel_df = panel.copy()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 150
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 151,
            "text": "    if \"athlete_display_name\" not in panel_df.columns:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 152,
            "text": "        raise ValueError(\"Panel must contain athlete_display_name for name matching.\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 153,
            "text": "    if not raw_p.is_file():"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 154,
            "text": "        raise FileNotFoundError("
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 155,
            "text": "            f\"Missing {raw_p}. Run scrape_bpm.run_batch after bpm_scrape_jobs.csv exists.\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 156,
            "text": "        )"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 157
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 158,
            "text": "    bpm = pd.read_csv(raw_p, low_memory=False)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 159,
            "text": "    req = {\"school_slug\", \"Player\", \"sr_year\", \"MP\"}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 160,
            "text": "    miss = req - set(bpm.columns)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 161,
            "text": "    if miss:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 162,
            "text": "        raise ValueError(f\"bpm_player_season_raw.csv missing columns: {miss}\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 163,
            "text": "    if \"BPM\" not in bpm.columns:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 164,
            "text": "        bpm[\"BPM\"] = float(\"nan\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 165
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 166,
            "text": "    if crosswalk is None:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 167,
            "text": "        cw_path = paths.sr_crosswalk_csv()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 168,
            "text": "        if not cw_path.is_file():"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 169,
            "text": "            raise FileNotFoundError(f\"Missing {cw_path}. Run ensure_crosswalk() first.\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 170,
            "text": "        cw = pd.read_csv(cw_path, low_memory=False)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 171,
            "text": "    else:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 172,
            "text": "        cw = crosswalk"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 173
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 174,
            "text": "    if \"school_slug\" in panel_df.columns:"
          }
        ],
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 266
          },
          "startPosition": {
            "column": 14,
            "line": 117
          }
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./sports_pipeline/bpm_merge.py",
        "signatures": {}
      },
      "score": 0.20109379291534424
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 156,
            "text": "def ventile_provenance_lines("
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 157,
            "text": "    use: pd.DataFrame,"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 158,
            "text": "    cfg: Any,"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 159,
            "text": "    bin_tab: pd.DataFrame,"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 160,
            "text": ") -\u003e list[str]:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 198
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 199,
            "text": "    if lu_path.is_file():"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 200,
            "text": "        lu = pd.read_csv(lu_path, usecols=[\"athlete_id\", \"draft_year\"], low_memory=False)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 201,
            "text": "        lu[\"athlete_id\"] = pd.to_numeric(lu[\"athlete_id\"], errors=\"coerce\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 202,
            "text": "        lu = lu.dropna(subset=[\"athlete_id\"])"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 203,
            "text": "        lu[\"athlete_id\"] = lu[\"athlete_id\"].astype(int)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 204,
            "text": "        ids = set(use[\"athlete_id\"].astype(int))"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 205,
            "text": "        hit = lu.loc[lu[\"athlete_id\"].isin(ids)]"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 206,
            "text": "        hit = hit.dropna(subset=[\"draft_year\"])"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 207,
            "text": "        if len(hit):"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 208,
            "text": "            dy = hit[\"draft_year\"].astype(int)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 209,
            "text": "            lines.append("
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 210,
            "text": "                f\"Draft lookup (athlete_id_draft_lookup): NBA draft years {int(dy.min())}–{int(dy.max())} \""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 211,
            "text": "                f\"among lookup rows whose athlete_id appears in this sample (n_lookup_rows={len(hit):,}).\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 212,
            "text": "            )"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 213,
            "text": "        n_d1 = int((use[\"Y_draft\"] == 1).sum())"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 214,
            "text": "        lines.append(f\"Draft outcome on sample: Y_draft=1 on {n_d1:,} player-seasons (ever-draft flag).\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 215
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 216,
            "text": "    metric = str(getattr(cfg, \"perf_metric\", \"minutes\")).strip().lower()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 217,
            "text": "    try:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 218,
            "text": "        _, col = resolve_perf_metric(metric)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 219,
            "text": "    except ValueError:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 220,
            "text": "        col = \"minutes\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 221,
            "text": "    if col in (\"BPM\", \"OBPM\", \"DBPM\"):"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 222,
            "text": "        if col in use.columns:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 223,
            "text": "            m = use[col].notna()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 224,
            "text": "            if m.any():"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 225,
            "text": "                ss = use.loc[m, \"season\"].astype(int)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 226,
            "text": "                lines.append("
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 227,
            "text": "                    f\"SR matched advanced (&#96;perf&#96; ← {col}): collegiate seasons with non-null {col} \""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 228,
            "text": "                    f\"on sample rows {int(ss.min())}–{int(ss.max())} (n={int(m.sum()):,} player-seasons).\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 229,
            "text": "                )"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 230,
            "text": "            else:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 231,
            "text": "                lines.append(f\"SR matched (&#96;perf&#96; ← {col}): no non-null values on sample rows.\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 232,
            "text": "        else:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 233,
            "text": "            lines.append(f\"SR matched: column {col!r} missing on panel — check BPM merge.\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 234,
            "text": "    else:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 235,
            "text": "        lines.append("
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 236,
            "text": "            f\"SR advanced: not used for &#96;perf&#96; (ESPN box column {col!r}; teammate LOO pool quality from that measure).\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 237,
            "text": "        )"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 238
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 239,
            "text": "    lines.append(\"\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 240,
            "text": "    lines.append(\"Per-ventile n (player-seasons per bin; vent 0 = lowest poolq_loo):\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 241,
            "text": "    bt = bin_tab.sort_values(\"vent\", kind=\"stable\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 242,
            "text": "    chunks: list[str] = []"
          }
        ],
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 248
          },
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 155
          }
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./sports_pipeline/panel_build.py",

                "column": 5,
                "line": 161
              },
              "startPosition": {
                "column": 1,
                "line": 156

          ]
        }
      },

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 38,
            "text": "def summarize_data_integrity(panel: pd.DataFrame, cfg: Any) -\u003e str:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 109
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 110,
            "text": "    if not p_m.is_file():"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 111,
            "text": "        w(f\"- FILE MISSING: {p_m}\\n\\n\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 112,
            "text": "    else:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 113,
            "text": "        dm = pd.read_csv(p_m, low_memory=False)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 114,
            "text": "        if \"year\" not in dm.columns:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 115,
            "text": "            w(\"- No &#96;year&#96; column; skipping draft-year window rates.\\n\\n\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 116,
            "text": "        else:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 117,
            "text": "            in_win = dm[(dm[\"year\"] \u003e= dy_lo) \u0026 (dm[\"year\"] \u003c= dy_hi)]"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 118,
            "text": "            n_in = len(in_win)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 119,
            "text": "            w("
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 120,
            "text": "                f\"- All rows: {len(dm):,}; draft years used for window: \""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 121,
            "text": "                f\"{dy_lo}–{dy_hi} (season window {s_lo}–{s_hi} minus \""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 122,
            "text": "                f\"{getattr(cfg, 'draft_year_before_season', 1)} / plus \""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 123,
            "text": "                f\"{getattr(cfg, 'draft_year_after_season', 5)})\\n\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 124,
            "text": "            )"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 125,
            "text": "            w(f\"- Draft picks in that draft-year band: {n_in:,}\\n\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 126,
            "text": "            if n_in \u003e 0:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 127,
            "text": "                has_ath = in_win[\"athlete_id\"].notna()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 128,
            "text": "                w("
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 129,
            "text": "                    f\"  - With &#96;athlete_id&#96; (player matched to spine): \""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 130,
            "text": "                    f\"{has_ath.sum():,} ({has_ath.mean():.1%})\\n\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 131,
            "text": "                )"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 132,
            "text": "                has_team = in_win[\"team_short_display_name\"].notna()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 133,
            "text": "                w("
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 134,
            "text": "                    f\"  - With ESPN &#96;team_short_display_name&#96; (school mapped): \""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 135,
            "text": "                    f\"{has_team.sum():,} ({has_team.mean():.1%})\\n\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 136,
            "text": "                )"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 137,
            "text": "            w(\"\\n\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 138
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 139,
            "text": "    w(\"**Lookup table (&#96;athlete_id_draft_lookup.csv&#96;)**\\n\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 140,
            "text": "    p_lu = paths.draft_lookup_csv()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 141,
            "text": "    if not p_lu.is_file():"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 142,
            "text": "        w(f\"- FILE MISSING: {p_lu}\\n\\n\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 143,
            "text": "    else:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 144,
            "text": "        lu = pd.read_csv(p_lu, low_memory=False)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 145,
            "text": "        w(f\"- Linked athlete rows: {len(lu):,}\\n\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 146,
            "text": "        if \"draft_year\" in lu.columns:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 147,
            "text": "            w("
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 148,
            "text": "                f\"- draft_year range in lookup: \""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 149,
            "text": "                f\"{int(lu['draft_year'].min())}–{int(lu['draft_year'].max())}\\n\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 150,
            "text": "            )"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 151,
            "text": "        w(\"\\n\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 152
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 153,
            "text": "    w(\"**Cached diagnostic summary (if present)**\\n\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 154,
            "text": "    p_sum = paths.draft_match_diagnostic_summary_csv()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 155,
            "text": "    if p_sum.is_file():"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 156,
            "text": "        sm = pd.read_csv(p_sum)"
          }
        ],
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 168

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 270,
            "text": "def run_sr_refresh_stage("
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 271,
            "text": "    cfg: Any,"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 272,
            "text": "    panel: pd.DataFrame,"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 273,
            "text": "    *,"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 274,
            "text": "    do_crosswalk: bool = True,"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 275,
            "text": "    do_scrape_jobs: bool = True,"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 276,
            "text": "    do_scrape: bool = True,"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 277,
            "text": "    do_match: bool = True,"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 278,
            "text": ") -\u003e dict[str, Any]:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 279,
            "text": "    \"\"\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 280,
            "text": "    Run the full SR maintenance chain in order: crosswalk → scrape jobs → network scrape →"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 281,
            "text": "    raw→matched. Pass the same &#96;&#96;panel&#96;&#96; you built in **CELL 4** (needs &#96;&#96;team_id&#96;&#96;,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 282,
            "text": "    &#96;&#96;season&#96;&#96;). After this, re-run &#96;&#96;panel_rebuild.build_from_box(cfg)&#96;&#96; so SR columns"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 283,
            "text": "    refresh from &#96;&#96;bpm_player_season_matched.csv&#96;&#96;."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 284
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 285,
            "text": "    Toggle any step off when you only need part of the chain (e.g. &#96;&#96;do_scrape=False&#96;&#96; if"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 286,
            "text": "    raw is already complete). Network scrape requires &#96;&#96;pip install -e '.[scrape]'&#96;&#96;."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 287,
            "text": "    \"\"\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 288,
            "text": "    out: dict[str, Any] = {\"stage\": \"sr_refresh\", \"steps\": {}}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 289,
            "text": "    summary_bits: list[str] = []"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 290
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 291,
            "text": "    if do_crosswalk:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 292,
            "text": "        cw = ensure_crosswalk(cfg)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 293,
            "text": "        n_teams = len(cw)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 294,
            "text": "        out[\"steps\"][\"crosswalk\"] = {\"n_teams\": n_teams}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 295,
            "text": "        summary_bits.append(f\"crosswalk_teams={n_teams}\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 296
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 297,
            "text": "    if do_scrape_jobs:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 298,
            "text": "        jobs_path = write_scrape_jobs(panel, cfg)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 299,
            "text": "        jobs = pd.read_csv(jobs_path, low_memory=False)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 300,
            "text": "        n_jobs = len(jobs)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 301,
            "text": "        out[\"steps\"][\"scrape_jobs\"] = {\"path\": str(jobs_path), \"n_slug_season\": n_jobs}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 302,
            "text": "        summary_bits.append(f\"scrape_jobs={n_jobs}\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 303
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 304,
            "text": "    if do_scrape:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 305,
            "text": "        from sports_pipeline import scrape_bpm"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 306
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 307,
            "text": "        scrape_out = scrape_bpm.run_batch(pipeline_cfg=cfg)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 308,
            "text": "        out[\"steps\"][\"scrape\"] = scrape_out"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 309,
            "text": "        summary_bits.append("
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 310,
            "text": "            f\"scrape_ok={scrape_out.get('n_ok', 0)} fail={scrape_out.get('n_fail', 0)}\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 311,
            "text": "        )"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 312
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 313,
            "text": "    if do_match:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 314,
            "text": "        match_out = run_match(cfg, panel=panel)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 315,
            "text": "        out[\"steps\"][\"match\"] = match_out"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 316,
            "text": "        summary_bits.append("
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 317,
            "text": "            f\"matched_rows={match_out.get('n_matched_rows', 0)} \""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 318,
            "text": "            f\"match_rate={match_out.get('match_rate_rows', 0):.1%}\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 319,
            "text": "        )"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 320
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 321,
            "text": "    print(\"SR refresh — \" + \" | \".join(summary_bits) if summary_bits else \"SR refresh — (no steps run)\")"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 322,
            "text": "    return out"
          }
        ],
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "column": 14,
            "line": 321
          },
          "startPosition": {
            "column": 5,
            "line": 266
          }
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./sports_pipeline/bpm_merge.py",
        "signatures": {}
      },
      "score": 0.17648270726203918
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 38,
            "text": "def summarize_data_integrity(panel: pd.DataFrame, cfg: Any) -\u003e str:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 154
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 155,
            "text": "    if p_sum.is_file():"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 156,
            "text": "        sm = pd.read_csv(p_sum)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 157,
            "text": "        def _val(cat, sub, met):"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 158,
            "text": "            r = sm[(sm[\"category\"] == cat) \u0026 (sm[\"subcategory\"] == sub) \u0026 (sm[\"metric\"] == met)]"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 159,
            "text": "            return int(r[\"value\"].iloc[0]) if len(r) else None"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 160
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 161,
            "text": "        dr = _val(\"total\", \"all\", \"draft_rows\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 162,
            "text": "        ma = _val(\"total\", \"all\", \"matched_athlete_id\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 163,
            "text": "        if dr is not None and ma is not None:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 164,
            "text": "            w(f\"- From &#96;draft_match_diagnostic_summary.csv&#96;: draft_rows={dr}, matched_athlete_id={ma} \")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 165,
            "text": "            w(f\"({ma}/{dr} = {ma/dr:.1%} global pipeline player-match)\\n\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 166,
            "text": "    else:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 167,
            "text": "        w(\"- (no &#96;draft_match_diagnostic_summary.csv&#96;)\\n\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 168
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 169,
            "text": "    return buf.getvalue()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 170
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 171
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 172,
            "text": "def print_data_integrity(panel: pd.DataFrame, cfg: Any) -\u003e None:"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 173,
            "text": "    print(summarize_data_integrity(panel, cfg))"
          }
        ],
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "column": 47,
            "line": 172
          },
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 37
          }
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./sports_pipeline/data_integrity.py",
        "signatures": {
          "ranges": [
            {
              "endPosition": {
                "column": 5,
                "line": 39
              },
              "startPosition": {
                "column": 1,
                "line": 38
              }
            }
          ]
        }
      },
      "score": 0.17228570580482483
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 18,
            "text": "@dataclass"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 19,
            "text": "class PipelineConfig:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 44
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 45,
            "text": "    #: Optional winsor on &#96;&#96;poolq_loo&#96;&#96; after LOO (e.g. &#96;&#96;(0.01, 0.99)&#96;&#96;); &#96;&#96;None&#96;&#96; = off."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 46,
            "text": "    poolq_winsor_quantiles: tuple[float, float] | None = None"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 47,
            "text": "    #: If True, replace &#96;&#96;perf&#96;&#96; with its z-score **within collegiate season** before LOO"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 48,
            "text": "    #: (&#96;&#96;poolq_loo&#96;&#96; is then in cross-player SD units within each season)."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 49,
            "text": "    perf_zscore_within_season: bool = False"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 50
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 51,
            "text": "    # --- SR refresh (&#96;&#96;conductor.run_conductor&#96;&#96; — only if &#96;&#96;run_sr_refresh&#96;&#96;) ----------"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 52,
            "text": "    #: If True, run crosswalk / jobs / optional scrape / match before final panel merge."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 53,
            "text": "    run_sr_refresh: bool = False"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 54,
            "text": "    sr_refresh_do_crosswalk: bool = True"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 55,
            "text": "    sr_refresh_do_scrape_jobs: bool = True"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 56,
            "text": "    #: Network fetch to SR (needs &#96;&#96;pip install -e '.[scrape]'&#96;&#96;)."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 57,
            "text": "    sr_refresh_do_scrape: bool = False"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 58,
            "text": "    sr_refresh_do_match: bool = True"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 59
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 60,
            "text": "    # --- Conductor steps (&#96;&#96;conductor.run_conductor&#96;&#96;) ---------------------------------"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 61,
            "text": "    #: Print ingest/draft/SR stub dicts (usually leave False)."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 62,
            "text": "    run_stage3_status: bool = False"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 63,
            "text": "    run_data_integrity_report: bool = True"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 64,
            "text": "    run_yearly_coverage_chart: bool = True"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 65,
            "text": "    run_ventile_eda: bool = True"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 66,
            "text": "    run_dirty_lpm: bool = True"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 67,
            "text": "    #: After a successful run, write &#96;&#96;PANEL&#96;&#96; to CSV (default path: canonical panel file)."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 68,
            "text": "    export_panel_after_run: bool = False"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 69,
            "text": "    export_panel_dest: Path | None = None"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 70
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 71,
            "text": "    # --- Data integrity report (&#96;data_integrity.summarize_data_integrity&#96;) ------------"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 72,
            "text": "    #: If both set, collegiate season window for the report; else min/max seasons from plot subset &#96;use&#96;."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 73,
            "text": "    analysis_season_min: int | None = None"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 74,
            "text": "    analysis_season_max: int | None = None"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 75,
            "text": "    #: Draft-year band for match-rate denominators: [season_min - before, season_max + after]."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 76,
            "text": "    draft_year_before_season: int = 1"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 77,
            "text": "    draft_year_after_season: int = 5"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 78
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 79,
            "text": "    # --- Stage toggles (stubs until ingest/draft/SR code is ported) --------------------"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 80,
            "text": "    run_spine_refresh: bool = False"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 81,
            "text": "    run_draft_match: bool = False"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 82,
            "text": "    #: If True, &#96;sr_bpm.run&#96; calls &#96;scrape_bpm.run_batch&#96; (needs &#96;pip install -e .[scrape]&#96;)."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 83,
            "text": "    run_sr_scrape: bool = False"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 84,
            "text": "    #: Optional contact string embedded in the scraper User-Agent (email or URL)."
          }
        ],
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 94
          },
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 17
          }

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 433,
            "text": "def run_batch("
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 434,
            "text": "    scrape_cfg: ScrapeBpmConfig | None = None,"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 435,
            "text": "    *,"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 436,
            "text": "    pipeline_cfg: Any | None = None,"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 437,
            "text": ") -\u003e dict[str, Any]:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 567
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 568,
            "text": "                if pbar is not None:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 569,
            "text": "                    pbar.update(1)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 570,
            "text": "                    pos = min(n_done_at_start + n_ok + n_fail, n_total)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 571,
            "text": "                    pbar.set_postfix("
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 572,
            "text": "                        ok=n_ok,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 573,
            "text": "                        fail=n_fail,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 574,
            "text": "                        list_pct=f\"{100 * pos / n_total:.1f}%\" if n_total else \"n/a\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 575,
            "text": "                        refresh=False,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 576,
            "text": "                    )"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 577,
            "text": "        except KeyboardInterrupt:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 578,
            "text": "            interrupted = True"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 579,
            "text": "            print(\"KeyboardInterrupt — flushing buffer, then stop.\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 580,
            "text": "    finally:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 581,
            "text": "        raw_header = _flush_raw_buffer(out_raw, raw_buf, raw_header)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 582,
            "text": "        if pbar is not None:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 583,
            "text": "            pbar.close()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 584
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 585,
            "text": "    elapsed = time.time() - t0"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 586,
            "text": "    print(f\"Done in {elapsed:.1f}s — ok={n_ok} fail={n_fail}\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 587
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 588,
            "text": "    refresh_sr_slug_alias_cache()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 589,
            "text": "    if n_ok \u003e 0 and out_raw.is_file() and out_raw.stat().st_size \u003e 0:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 590,
            "text": "        _dedupe_out_raw(out_raw)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 591,
            "text": "        br = _read_out_raw_safe(out_raw)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 592,
            "text": "        print(\"Updated\", out_raw, \"rows:\", len(br))"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 593,
            "text": "    elif len(to_fetch) == 0:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 594,
            "text": "        print(\"Nothing to fetch — left\", out_raw)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 595
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 596,
            "text": "    return {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 597,
            "text": "        \"stage\": \"scrape_bpm\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 598,
            "text": "        \"out_raw\": str(out_raw),"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 599,
            "text": "        \"n_ok\": n_ok,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 600,
            "text": "        \"n_fail\": n_fail,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 601,
            "text": "        \"n_to_fetch\": len(to_fetch),"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 602,
            "text": "        \"interrupted\": interrupted,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 603,
            "text": "        \"fail_404_slugs\": sorted(fail_404),"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 604,
            "text": "        \"fail_other\": fail_other,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 605,
            "text": "        \"seconds\": elapsed,"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 606,
            "text": "    }"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 607
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 608
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 609,
            "text": "def fetch_html(url: str, *, scrape_cfg: ScrapeBpmConfig | None = None) -\u003e str:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 610,
            "text": "    "
          }
        ],
```
