            "text": "def run_ventile_eda(df: pd.DataFrame, cfg: Any) -\u003e tuple[pd.DataFrame, Path]:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 466,
            "text": "    \"\"\"Filter → binned table CSV → ventile PNG (with optional quadratic overlay).\"\"\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 467,
            "text": "    use = filter_panel(df, cfg)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 468,
            "text": "    bin_tab = ventile_table(use, cfg)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 469,
            "text": "    out_dir = Path(getattr(cfg, \"exports_dir\", paths.mbb_dir() / \"exports_inverted_u_v0\"))"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 470,
            "text": "    out_dir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 471,
            "text": "    stamp = date.today().isoformat()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 472,
            "text": "    plot_slug = export_plot_slug(cfg)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 473,
            "text": "    csv_path = out_dir / f\"binned_draft_rate_ventiles_{plot_slug}_{stamp}.csv\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 474,
            "text": "    bin_tab.to_csv(csv_path, index=False)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 475
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 476,
            "text": "    prov_lines = ventile_provenance_lines(use, cfg, bin_tab) if len(use) else []"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 477,
            "text": "    prov_path = out_dir / f\"ventile_eda_provenance_{plot_slug}_{stamp}.txt\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 478,
            "text": "    prov_path.write_text(\"\\n\".join(prov_lines) + \"\\n\", encoding=\"utf-8\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 479,
            "text": "    print(\"--- Ventile EDA — sample / datasets / per-ventile n ---\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 480,
            "text": "    print(\"\\n\".join(prov_lines))"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 481,
            "text": "    print(f\"(Also wrote {prov_path.name})\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 482,
            "text": "    print()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 483
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 484,
            "text": "    png_path = ventile_plot("
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 485,
            "text": "        bin_tab, cfg, len(use), use=use, provenance_lines=prov_lines if prov_lines else None"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 486,
            "text": "    )"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 487,
            "text": "    return bin_tab, png_path"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 488
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 489
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 490,
            "text": "def run_dirty_lpm(df: pd.DataFrame, cfg: Any) -\u003e Any | pd.Series:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 491,
            "text": "    \"\"\""
          }
        ],

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 183,
            "text": "def ventile_table(df: pd.DataFrame, cfg: Any) -\u003e pd.DataFrame:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 184,
            "text": "    \"\"\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 185,
            "text": "    Bin &#96;&#96;poolq_loo&#96;&#96; (quantile or equal-width per &#96;&#96;cfg.poolq_binning&#96;&#96;); within each bin,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 186,
            "text": "    mean &#96;&#96;Y_draft&#96;&#96; = empirical draft rate. Column &#96;&#96;vent&#96;&#96; is the bin index (0 = lowest poolq)."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 187,
            "text": "    \"\"\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 188,
            "text": "    q = int(getattr(cfg, \"ventiles\", 20))"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 189,
            "text": "    mode = str(getattr(cfg, \"poolq_binning\", \"quantile\")).strip().lower()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 190,
            "text": "    work = df.copy()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 191,
            "text": "    work[\"vent\"] = assign_poolq_bin_labels(work[\"poolq_loo\"], q, mode)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 192,
            "text": "    return ("
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 193,
            "text": "        work.dropna(subset=[\"vent\"])"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 194,
            "text": "        .groupby(\"vent\", observed=True)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 195,
            "text": "        .agg("
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 196,
            "text": "            n=(\"Y_draft\", \"size\"),"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 197,
            "text": "            draft_rate=(\"Y_draft\", \"mean\"),"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 198,
            "text": "            poolq_mean=(\"poolq_loo\", \"mean\"),"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 199,
            "text": "        )"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 200,
            "text": "        .reset_index()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 201,
            "text": "        .sort_values(\"vent\")"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 202,
            "text": "    )"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 203
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 204
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 205,
            "text": "def ventile_provenance_lines("
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 206,
            "text": "    use: pd.DataFrame,"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 207,
            "text": "    cfg: Any,"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 208,
            "text": "    bin_tab: pd.DataFrame,"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 209,
            "text": ") -\u003e list[str]:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 210,
            "text": "    "
          }
        ],
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 320
          },
          "startPosition": {
            "column": 69,
            "line": 179
          }
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./sports_pipeline/panel_build.py",
        "signatures": {}
      },
      "score": 0.3588378131389618
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 205,
            "text": "def ventile_provenance_lines("
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 206,
            "text": "    use: pd.DataFrame,"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 207,
            "text": "    cfg: Any,"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 208,
            "text": "    bin_tab: pd.DataFrame,"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 209,
            "text": ") -\u003e list[str]:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 210,
            "text": "    \"\"\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 211,
            "text": "    Human-readable lines: modeling sample scope, BOX/SR/draft year spans, and per-ventile n."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 212
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 213,
            "text": "    Used under the ventile figure and in a sidecar &#96;&#96;.txt&#96;&#96; export."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 214,
            "text": "    \"\"\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 215,
            "text": "    lines: list[str] = []"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 216,
            "text": "    n = int(len(use))"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 217,
            "text": "    u_ath = int(use[\"athlete_id\"].nunique())"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 218,
            "text": "    s = pd.to_numeric(use[\"season\"], errors=\"coerce\").dropna().astype(int)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 219,
            "text": "    slo, shi = int(s.min()), int(s.max())"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 220,
            "text": "    lines.append("
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 221,
            "text": "        f\"Modeling sample (after dropna poolq_loo, Y_draft; min_minutes; optional team draftee filter): \""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 222,
            "text": "        f\"n={n:,} player-seasons; {u_ath:,} unique athletes; collegiate seasons {slo}–{shi}.\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 223,
            "text": "    )"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 224,
            "text": "    bin_mode = str(getattr(cfg, \"poolq_binning\", \"quantile\")).strip().lower()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 225,
            "text": "    nv = int(getattr(cfg, \"ventiles\", 20))"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 226,
            "text": "    lines.append("
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 227,
            "text": "        f\"poolq_loo EDA bins: poolq_binning={bin_mode!r}, ventiles={nv} (number of bins). \""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 228,
            "text": "        + ("
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 229,
            "text": "            \"quantile: ~equal counts per bin (pd.qcut); 20 bins = traditional ventiles.\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 230,
            "text": "            if bin_mode == \"quantile\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 231,
            "text": "            else \"equal_width: equal intervals from min to max poolq_loo (pd.cut).\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 232,
            "text": "        )"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 233,
            "text": "    )"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 234
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 235,
            "text": "    if bool(getattr(cfg, \"restrict_teams_by_draftees\", True)):"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 236,
            "text": "        dr = str(getattr(cfg, \"draftee_restriction\", \"all_time\")).strip().lower()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 237,
            "text": "        lines.append("
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 238,
            "text": "            f\"Team draftee filter: restrict_teams_by_draftees=True, draftee_restriction={dr!r} — \""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 239,
            "text": "            + ("
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 240,
            "text": "                \"only (team_id, season) with ≥1 roster member Y_draft=1.\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 241,
            "text": "                if dr == \"season\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 242,
            "text": "                else \"only team_id with ≥1 Y_draft=1 anywhere in this filtered sample.\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 243,
            "text": "            )"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 244,
            "text": "        )"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 245,
            "text": "    else:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 246,
            "text": "        lines.append(\"Team draftee filter: off (restrict_teams_by_draftees=False).\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 247
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 248,
            "text": "    lo = getattr(cfg, \"analysis_season_min\", None)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 249,
            "text": "    hi = getattr(cfg, \"analysis_season_max\", None)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 250,
            "text": "    if lo is not None and hi is not None:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 251,
            "text": "        lines.append("
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 252,
            "text": "            f\"CFG analysis_season_min/max: {int(lo)}–{int(hi)} \""
          }
        ],
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 320
          },
          "startPosition": {
            "column": 5,
            "line": 201
          }
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./sports_pipeline/panel_build.py",
        "signatures": {}
      },
      "score": 0.3506813943386078
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 25,
            "text": "@dataclass"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 26,
            "text": "class PipelineConfig:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 46
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 47,
            "text": "    poolq_binning: str = \"quantile\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 48,
            "text": "    #: Where PNG/CSV exports from &#96;panel_build.run_ventile_eda&#96; are written."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 49,
            "text": "    exports_dir: Path = field(default_factory=lambda: paths.mbb_dir() / \"exports_inverted_u_v0\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 50,
            "text": "    #: Which column(s) drive analysis after &#96;apply_perf_metric_for_analysis&#96;: &#96;ppm&#96;, &#96;minutes&#96;,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 51,
            "text": "    #: &#96;bpm&#96;, &#96;opm&#96;/&#96;obpm&#96;, &#96;dpm&#96;/&#96;dbpm&#96;. One conductor pass uses the **first** list entry;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 52,
            "text": "    #: use CELL 4 / &#96;RUN_ALL_PERF_METRICS&#96; to sweep. See &#96;perf_metric.perf_options_df()&#96;."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 53,
            "text": "    perf_metric: list[str] = field(default_factory=lambda: [\"minutes\"])"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 54,
            "text": "    #: If True, overlay the quadratic LPM curve on the ventile figure (same Y ~ poolq + poolq² spec)."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 55,
            "text": "    show_quadratic_lpm_on_eda_plot: bool = True"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 56,
            "text": "    #: If True, draw the sample / draft / per-ventile-n caption block under the ventile plot PNG."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 57,
            "text": "    #: Provenance is always written to &#96;&#96;ventile_eda_provenance_*.txt&#96;&#96; and printed when EDA runs."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 58,
            "text": "    ventile_plot_show_metadata: bool = True"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 59,
            "text": "    #: Optional winsor on &#96;&#96;poolq_loo&#96;&#96; after LOO (e.g. &#96;&#96;(0.01, 0.99)&#96;&#96;); &#96;&#96;None&#96;&#96; = off."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 60,
            "text": "    poolq_winsor_quantiles: tuple[float, float] | None = None"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 61,
            "text": "    #: If True, replace &#96;&#96;perf&#96;&#96; with its z-score **within collegiate season** before LOO"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 62,
            "text": "    #: (&#96;&#96;poolq_loo&#96;&#96; is then in cross-player SD units within each season)."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 63,
            "text": "    perf_zscore_within_season: bool = False"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 64,
            "text": "    #: After &#96;&#96;prepare_panel&#96;&#96;, print draft-unmapped college names + SR-unmatched ESPN teams (reads QA CSVs)."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 65,
            "text": "    print_unmatched_school_lists: bool = False"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 66,
            "text": "    #: Cap printed lines per section (&#96;&#96;None&#96;&#96; = print all). Full lists remain on disk in the cited CSVs."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 67,
            "text": "    unmatched_school_report_max_lines: int | None = 400"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 68,
            "text": "    #: If True, drop rows whose team fails the draftee rule below (ventiles, LPM, integrity &#96;&#96;use&#96;&#96;)."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 69,
            "text": "    restrict_teams_by_draftees: bool = True"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 70,
            "text": "    #: &#96;&#96;all_time&#96;&#96; — keep only &#96;&#96;team_id&#96;&#96;s with ≥1 row with &#96;&#96;Y_draft==1&#96;&#96; anywhere in the filtered sample."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 71,
            "text": "    #: &#96;&#96;season&#96;&#96; — keep only &#96;&#96;(team_id, season)&#96;&#96; with ≥1 roster member with &#96;&#96;Y_draft==1&#96;&#96; that season."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 72,
            "text": "    draftee_restriction: str = \"all_time\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 73
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 74,
            "text": "    # --- SR refresh (&#96;&#96;conductor.run_conductor&#96;&#96; — only if &#96;&#96;run_sr_refresh&#96;&#96;) ----------"
          }
        ],
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {

          },

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 1,
            "text": "\"\"\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2,
            "text": "Conductor configuration (&#96;PipelineConfig&#96;)."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4,
            "text": "**Performance metric:** set &#96;perf_metric&#96; to a **list** of user keys (e.g. &#96;&#96;[\\\"minutes\\\"]&#96;&#96;,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 5,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;[\\\"obpm\\\", \\\"ws40\\\"]&#96;&#96;). A single string is normalized to a one-element list at init."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 6,
            "text": "&#96;run_conductor&#96; uses the **first** entry per pass; sweep more keys in CELL 4 or"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 7,
            "text": "&#96;RUN_ALL_PERF_METRICS&#96;. Allowed values and plot text live in &#96;sports_pipeline.perf_metric&#96;."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 8,
            "text": "&#96;perf_measure_label&#96; reflects the **active** (first) metric."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 9,
            "text": "\"\"\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 10
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 11,
            "text": "from __future__ import annotations"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 12
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 13,
            "text": "from dataclasses import dataclass, field"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 14,
            "text": "from pathlib import Path"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 15
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 16,
            "text": "from sports_pipeline import paths"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 17,
            "text": "from sports_pipeline.perf_metric import ("
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 18,
            "text": "    normalize_perf_metric_list,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 19,
            "text": "    perf_metric_active,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 20,
            "text": "    plot_label_for_metric,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 21,
            "text": "    resolve_perf_metric,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 22,
            "text": ")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 23
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 24
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 25,
            "text": "@dataclass"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 26,
            "text": "class PipelineConfig:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 27,
            "text": "    \"\"\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 28,
            "text": "    Shared knobs for &#96;530_sports_pipeline.ipynb&#96; and &#96;sports_pipeline.*&#96; stages."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 29
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 30,
            "text": "    Many fields are placeholders for future stage wiring (&#96;run_spine_refresh&#96;, etc.)."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 31,
            "text": "    \"\"\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 32
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 33,
            "text": "    # --- Panel / EDA (ventile plot + LPM) ---------------------------------"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 34,
            "text": "    #: If True, read &#96;&#96;player_season_panel_530.csv&#96;&#96; instead of rebuilding from box."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 35,
            "text": "    #: After SR refresh, matched stats are merged from disk onto that frame."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 36,
            "text": "    use_prebuilt_panel_csv: bool = False"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 37,
            "text": "    #: When rebuilding from box (&#96;panel_rebuild.build_from_box&#96;): inclusive season bounds."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 38,
            "text": "    #: &#96;&#96;None&#96;&#96; = use all seasons present in &#96;mbb_df_player_box.csv&#96;."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 39,
            "text": "    panel_season_min: int | None = None"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 40,
            "text": "    panel_season_max: int | None = None"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 41,
            "text": "    #: Drop player-seasons below this many minutes before LOO / ventiles (0 = no filter)."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 42,
            "text": "    min_minutes: float = 0.0"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 43,
            "text": "    #: Number of bins for nonparametric draft-rate vs &#96;&#96;poolq_loo&#96;&#96; EDA (see &#96;&#96;poolq_binning&#96;&#96;)."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 44,
            "text": "    ventiles: int = 20"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 45,
            "text": "    #: &#96;&#96;quantile&#96;&#96; — &#96;&#96;pd.qcut&#96;&#96; (~equal count per bin; 20 bins = traditional *ventiles*)."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 46,
            "text": "    #: &#96;&#96;equal_width&#96;&#96; — &#96;&#96;pd.cut&#96;&#96; on the min–max range of &#96;&#96;poolq_loo&#96;&#96; (same idea as 520 &#96;&#96;equal_width&#96;&#96;)."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 47,
            "text": "    poolq_binning: str = \"quantile\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 48,
            "text": "    #: Where PNG/CSV exports from &#96;panel_build.run_ventile_eda&#96; are written."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 49,
            "text": "    exports_dir: Path = field(default_factory="
          }
        ],
        "range": {

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 57,
            "text": "def run_conductor_from_panel(cfg: Any, panel: pd.DataFrame) -\u003e dict[str, Any]:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 58,
            "text": "    \"\"\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 59,
            "text": "    Run perf → integrity → coverage → ventiles → export on &#96;&#96;panel&#96;&#96; without reloading it."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 60
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 61,
            "text": "    &#96;&#96;panel&#96;&#96; must be the pre-perf frame (same as &#96;&#96;prepare_panel&#96;&#96; returns). Pass"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 62,
            "text": "    &#96;&#96;panel.copy(deep=True)&#96;&#96; per metric when looping so each run starts from a clean base."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 63,
            "text": "    \"\"\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 64,
            "text": "    out: dict[str, Any] = {\"stage\": \"530_conductor\"}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 65,
            "text": "    out[\"panel_shape_before_perf\"] = tuple(panel.shape)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 66
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 67,
            "text": "    panel_work = panel_build.apply_perf_metric_for_analysis("
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 68,
            "text": "        panel,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 69,
            "text": "        perf_metric_active(cfg),"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 70,
            "text": "        poolq_winsor_quantiles=getattr(cfg, \"poolq_winsor_quantiles\", None),"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 71,
            "text": "        zscore_perf_within_season=bool(getattr(cfg, \"perf_zscore_within_season\", False)),"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 72,
            "text": "    )"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 73,
            "text": "    out[\"PANEL\"] = panel_work"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 74
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 75,
            "text": "    if bool(getattr(cfg, \"run_data_integrity_report\", True)):"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 76,
            "text": "        print(\"--- Data integrity ---\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 77,
            "text": "        data_integrity.print_data_integrity(panel_work, cfg)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 78,
            "text": "        print()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 79
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 80,
            "text": "    if bool(getattr(cfg, \"run_yearly_coverage_chart\", True)):"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 81,
            "text": "        tab, png = dataset_coverage.export_yearly_coverage_chart(cfg, show=True)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 82,
            "text": "        out[\"coverage_table\"] = tab"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 83,
            "text": "        out[\"coverage_png\"] = png"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 84
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 85,
            "text": "    if bool(getattr(cfg, \"run_ventile_eda\", True)):"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 86,
            "text": "        bin_tab, png = panel_build.run_ventile_eda(panel_work, cfg)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 87,
            "text": "        out[\"ventile_table\"] = bin_tab"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 88,
            "text": "        out[\"ventile_png\"] = png"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 89
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 90,
            "text": "    if bool(getattr(cfg, \"run_dirty_lpm\", True)):"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 91,
            "text": "        lpm = panel_build.run_dirty_lpm(panel_work, cfg)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 92,
            "text": "        out[\"lpm\"] = lpm"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 93,
            "text": "        if hasattr(lpm, \"summary\"):"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 94,
            "text": "            print(\"--- LPM (statsmodels) ---\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 95,
            "text": "            print(lpm.summary())"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 96,
            "text": "        else:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 97,
            "text": "            print(\"--- LPM coefficients (numpy OLS) ---\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 98,
            "text": "            print(lpm)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 99
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 100,
            "text": "    if bool(getattr(cfg, \"export_panel_after_run\", False)):"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 101,
            "text": "        dest = getattr(cfg, \"export_panel_dest\", None)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 102,
            "text": "        ep = panel_build.export_panel(panel_work, cfg, dest=dest)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 103,
            "text": "        out[\"exported_panel_path\"] = str(ep)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 104,
            "text": "        print(f\"--- Wrote panel CSV: {ep} ---\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 105
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 106,
            "text": "    print("
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 107,
            "text": "        f\"--- Conductor done — perf_metric="
          }
        ],
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 110
          },
          "startPosition": {
            "column": 16,
            "line": 53
          }
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./sports_pipeline/conductor.py",
        "signatures": {}
      },
      "score": 0.26223650574684143
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 205,
            "text": "def plot_yearly_coverage_grouped("
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 206,
            "text": "    tab: pd.DataFrame,"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 207,
            "text": "    cfg: Any,"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 208,
            "text": "    *,"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 209,
            "text": "    show: bool = True,"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 210,
            "text": "    stamp: str | None = None,"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 211,
            "text": "    plot_slug: str | None = None,"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 212,
            "text": ") -\u003e Path:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 260
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 261,
            "text": "    if lo is not None and hi is not None:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 262,
            "text": "        in_win = (years \u003e= int(lo)) \u0026 (years \u003c= int(hi))"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 263,
            "text": "        idx = np.flatnonzero(in_win)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 264,
            "text": "        if len(idx):"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 265,
            "text": "            ax.axvspan("
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 266,
            "text": "                float(idx[0]) - 0.5,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 267,
            "text": "                float(idx[-1]) + 0.5,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 268,
            "text": "                facecolor=\"#9b59b6\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 269,
            "text": "                alpha=0.12,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 270,
            "text": "                zorder=0,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 271,
            "text": "                label=f\"Highlighted window (seasons {int(lo)}–{int(hi)})\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 272,
            "text": "            )"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 273
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 274,
            "text": "    step = 1 if len(years) \u003c= 28 else max(1, len(years) // 20)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 275,
            "text": "    tick_idx = np.arange(0, len(years), step, dtype=int)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 276,
            "text": "    ax.set_xticks(x[tick_idx])"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 277,
            "text": "    ax.set_xticklabels([str(int(y)) for y in years[tick_idx]], rotation=45, ha=\"right\", fontsize=8)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 278,
            "text": "    ax.set_ylabel(\"Count\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 279,
            "text": "    ax.set_xlabel(\"Year (see subtitle — BOX/SR = season, DRAFT = draft year)\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 280,
            "text": "    ax.set_title("
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 281,
            "text": "        \"Player / pick coverage by year — BOX vs DRAFT vs SR\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 282,
            "text": "        fontsize=12,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 283,
            "text": "    )"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 284,
            "text": "    fig.text("
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 285,
            "text": "        0.5,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 286,
            "text": "        0.02,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 287,
            "text": "        \"BOX \u0026 SR: ESPN/SR collegiate season. DRAFT: nbaplayersdraft &#96;year&#96; (June draft). \""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 288,
            "text": "        \"Use relative heights to choose overlapping analysis windows.\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 289,
            "text": "        ha=\"center\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 290,
            "text": "        fontsize=8,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 291,
            "text": "        style=\"italic\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 292,
            "text": "    )"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 293,
            "text": "    ax.legend(loc=\"upper left\", fontsize=8, framealpha=0.92)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 294,
            "text": "    ax.grid(True, axis=\"y\", alpha=0.25)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 295,
            "text": "    ax.set_axisbelow(True)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 296,
            "text": "    fig.subplots_adjust(bottom=0.18, top=0.92)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 297,
            "text": "    fig.savefig(png, dpi=150)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 298,
            "text": "    if show:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 299,
            "text": "        plt.show()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 300,
            "text": "    plt.close(fig)"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 301,
            "text": "    return png"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 302
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 303
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 304,
            "text": "def _apply_analysis_window_shade(ax: Any, years: np.ndarray, x: np.ndarray, cfg: Any) -\u003e None:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 305,
            "text": "    "
          }
        ],

      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 321,
            "text": "def plot_metric_coverage_dashboard("
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 322,
            "text": "    detail: pd.DataFrame,"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 323,
            "text": "    cfg: Any,"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 324,
            "text": "    *,"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 325,
            "text": "    show: bool = True,"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 326,
            "text": "    stamp: str | None = None,"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 327,
            "text": "    plot_slug: str | None = None,"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 328,
            "text": ") -\u003e Path:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 382
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 383,
            "text": "    ax0b.bar("
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 384,
            "text": "        x,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 385,
            "text": "        detail[\"draft_picks\"],"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 386,
            "text": "        width=0.55,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 387,
            "text": "        alpha=0.38,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 388,
            "text": "        color=\"#c0392b\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 389,
            "text": "        label=\"DRAFT — register rows (June &#96;year&#96;; not season)\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 390,
            "text": "    )"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 391,
            "text": "    ax0b.set_ylabel(\"Draft register rows\", color=\"#a93226\", fontsize=9)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 392,
            "text": "    ax0b.tick_params(axis=\"y\", labelcolor=\"#a93226\", labelsize=8)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 393
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 394,
            "text": "    ax0.set_ylabel(\"Unique athletes (collegiate season)\", fontsize=10)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 395,
            "text": "    ax0.set_title("
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 396,
            "text": "        \"Coverage by year — ESPN box vs SR match vs overlap; draft on right axis\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 397,
            "text": "        fontsize=12,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 398,
            "text": "    )"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 399,
            "text": "    ax0.grid(True, axis=\"y\", alpha=0.25)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 400,
            "text": "    ax0.set_axisbelow(True)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 401
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 402,
            "text": "    h0, l0 = ax0.get_legend_handles_labels()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 403,
            "text": "    h1, l1 = ax0b.get_legend_handles_labels()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 404,
            "text": "    ax0.legend(h0 + h1, l0 + l1, loc=\"upper left\", fontsize=7.5, framealpha=0.94, ncol=1)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 405
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 406,
            "text": "    _apply_analysis_window_shade(ax1, years, x, cfg)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 407,
            "text": "    ax1.fill_between("
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 408,
            "text": "        x,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 409,
            "text": "        detail[\"pct_overlap_of_box_minpos\"],"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 410,
            "text": "        alpha=0.25,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 411,
            "text": "        color=\"#16a085\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 412,
            "text": "        step=\"mid\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 413,
            "text": "    )"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 414,
            "text": "    ax1.plot("
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 415,
            "text": "        x,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 416,
            "text": "        detail[\"pct_overlap_of_box_minpos\"],"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 417,
            "text": "        label=\"SR match rate: BOX∩SR / BOX (min\u003e0)  [%]\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 418,
            "text": "        color=\"#0d6e5c\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 419,
            "text": "        lw=2.0,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 420,
            "text": "    )"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 421,
            "text": "    ax1.plot("
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 422,
            "text": "        x,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 423,
            "text": "        detail[\"pct_sr_bpm_of_box_any\"],"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 424,
            "text": "        label=\"SR athletes / BOX any game  [%]\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 425,
            "text": "        color=\"#2980b9\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 426,
            "text": "        lw=1.3,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 427,
            "text": "        ls=\"--\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 428,
            "text": "        alpha=0.85,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 429,
            "text": "    )"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 430,
            "text": "    ax1.set_ylabel(\"Percent\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 431,
            "text": "    _mx = float(np.nanmax(detail[\"pct_overlap_of_box_minpos\"].to_numpy(dtype=float)))"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 432,
            "text": "    if not np.isfinite(_mx):"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 433,
            "text": "        _mx = 0.0"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 434,
            "text": "    ax1.set_ylim(0, min(100.0, max(15.0, _mx * 1.15)))"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 435,
            "text": "    ax1.grid(True, axis=\"y\", alpha=0.25)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 436,
            "text": "    ax1.set_axisbelow(True)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 437,
            "text": "    ax1.legend(loc=\"upper left\", fontsize=8, framealpha=0.92)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 438
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 439,
            "text": "    step = 1 if len(years) \u003c= 28 else max(1, len(years) // 20)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 440,
            "text": "    tick_idx = np.arange(0, len(years), step, dtype=int)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 441,
            "text": "    for ax in (ax0, ax1):"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 442,
            "text": "        ax.set_xticks(x[tick_idx])"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 443,
            "text": "        ax.set_xticklabels([str(int(y)) for y in years[tick_idx]], rotation=45, ha=\"right\", fontsize=8)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 444,
            "text": "    ax1.set_xlabel(\"Year — BOX \u0026 SR = collegiate season; draft axis = June draft year\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 445
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 446,
            "text": "    fig.text("
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 447,
            "text": "        0.5,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 448,
            "text": "        0.01,"
          }
        ],

      "codeBlock": {

          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 323,
            "text": "    cfg: Any,"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 324,
            "text": "    *,"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 325,
            "text": "    show: bool = True,"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 326,
            "text": "    stamp: str | None = None,"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 327,
            "text": "    plot_slug: str | None = None,"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 328,
            "text": ") -\u003e Path:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 443,
            "text": ", ha=\"right\", fontsize=8)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 444,
            "text": "    ax1.set_xlabel(\"Year — BOX \u0026 SR = collegiate season; draft axis = June draft year\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 445
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 446,
            "text": "    fig.text("
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 447,
            "text": "        0.5,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 448,
            "text": "        0.01,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 449,
            "text": "        \"Lower panel — solid: share of minute-positive BOX athletes (Σminutes\u003e0) who also appear in SR matched; \""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 450,
            "text": "        \"dashed: SR matched athlete count as % of unique BOX athletes with any game row (denominator is larger after \""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 451,
            "text": "        \"~2014, so dashed can sit below solid). OBPM/DBPM use the same SR rows as BPM.\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 452,
            "text": "        ha=\"center\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 453,
            "text": "        fontsize=7.5,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 454,
            "text": "        style=\"italic\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 455,
            "text": "    )"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 456,
            "text": "    fig.subplots_adjust(bottom=0.14, top=0.94)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 457,
            "text": "    fig.savefig(png, dpi=150)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 458,
            "text": "    if show:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 459,
            "text": "        plt.show()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 460,
            "text": "    plt.close(fig)"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 461,
            "text": "    return png"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 462
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 463
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,

          },

        "signatures": {
          "ranges": [
            {

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 1,
            "text": "\"\"\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2,
            "text": "Stage 4 — panel load, LOO diagnostics, ventile EDA, dirty LPM, export."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4,
            "text": "**Inputs:** Prefer an in-memory panel from &#96;&#96;panel_rebuild.build_from_box&#96;&#96; (then"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 5,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;apply_perf_metric_for_analysis&#96;&#96;). Alternatively load a pre-exported"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 6,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;player_season_panel_530.csv&#96;&#96; via &#96;&#96;load_panel&#96;&#96; if it already has draft + SR columns."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 7
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 8,
            "text": "**Performance / &#96;perf&#96;:** Ventiles and LPM read &#96;poolq_loo&#96; / &#96;poolq_sq&#96;. To switch"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 9,
            "text": "the measure **in this repo** without re-running the full legacy notebook:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 10
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 11,
            "text": "1. &#96;&#96;assign_perf_from_metric(df, \"bpm\")&#96;&#96; (or &#96;&#96;\"ppm\"&#96;&#96;, &#96;&#96;\"minutes\"&#96;&#96;, …) — copies"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 12,
            "text": "   the mapped column into &#96;&#96;perf&#96;&#96; (see &#96;&#96;sports_pipeline.perf_metric&#96;&#96;)."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 13,
            "text": "2. &#96;&#96;recompute_teammate_loo_pool_quality(df, ...)&#96;&#96; — rebuilds &#96;&#96;poolq_loo&#96;&#96; /"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 14,
            "text": "   &#96;&#96;poolq_sq&#96;&#96; as leave-one-out mean teammate &#96;&#96;perf&#96;&#96; within &#96;&#96;(team_id, season)&#96;&#96;."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 15
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 16,
            "text": "Plot titles use &#96;&#96;CFG.perf_measure_label&#96;&#96;, derived from the **active** (first) entry in"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 17,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;CFG.perf_metric&#96;&#96; via &#96;&#96;perf_metric.plot_label_for_metric&#96;&#96;. Re-export from &#96;&#96;530_sports_pipeline_bkup.ipynb&#96;&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 18,
            "text": "if you need winsorization / filters from the old Cells 5–9 verbatim."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 19
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 20,
            "text": "**Outputs:** PNG + CSV under &#96;CFG.exports_dir&#96; (dated filenames)."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 21,
            "text": "\"\"\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 22
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 23,
            "text": "from __future__ import annotations"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 24
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 25,
            "text": "import textwrap"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 26,
            "text": "import warnings"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 27,
            "text": "from datetime import date"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 28,
            "text": "from pathlib import Path"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 29,
            "text": "from typing import Any"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 30
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 31,
            "text": "import numpy as np"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 32,
            "text": "import pandas as pd"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 33
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 34,
            "text": "from sports_pipeline import paths"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 35,
            "text": "from sports_pipeline.perf_metric import export_plot_slug, perf_metric_active, resolve_perf_metric"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 36
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 37
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 38,
            "text": "def load_panel(cfg: Any) -\u003e pd.DataFrame:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 39,
            "text": "    \"\"\"Read the canonical 530 modeling CSV (&#96;paths.panel_530_csv()&#96;).\"\"\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 40,
            "text": "    p = paths.panel_530_csv()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 41,
            "text": "    if not p.is_file():"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 42,
            "text": "        raise FileNotFoundError(f\"Missing panel: {p}\")"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 43,
            "text": "    return pd.read_csv(p, low_memory=False)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 44
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 45
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 46,
            "text": "def assign_perf_from_metric(df: pd.DataFrame, metric: str) -\u003e pd.DataFrame:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 47,
            "text": "    "
          }
        ],
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 62
          },
          "startPosition": {}
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./sports_pipeline/panel_build.py",
        "signatures": {}
      },
      "score": 0.22645366191864014
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 321,
            "text": "def plot_metric_coverage_dashboard("
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 322,
            "text": "    detail: pd.DataFrame,"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 323,
            "text": "    cfg: Any,"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 324,
            "text": "    *,"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 325,
            "text": "    show: bool = True,"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 326,
            "text": "    stamp: str | None = None,"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 327,
            "text": "    plot_slug: str | None = None,"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 328,
            "text": ") -\u003e Path:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 329,
            "text": "    \"\"\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 330,
            "text": "    Two-panel figure: (1) counts — BOX vs minute-positive base vs SR advanced vs overlap, plus"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 331,
            "text": "    draft register on a secondary axis; (2) SR/BPM as a share of the BOX minute-positive base."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 332,
            "text": "    \"\"\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 333,
            "text": "    import matplotlib.pyplot as plt"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 334
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 335,
            "text": "    years = detail[\"year\"].to_numpy(dtype=int)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 336,
            "text": "    x = np.arange(len(years), dtype=float)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 337,
            "text": "    out_dir = Path(getattr(cfg, \"exports_dir\", paths.mbb_dir() / \"exports_inverted_u_v0\"))"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 338,
            "text": "    out_dir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 339,
            "text": "    stamp = stamp or date.today().isoformat()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 340,
            "text": "    slug = plot_slug if plot_slug is not None else export_plot_slug(cfg)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 341,
            "text": "    png = out_dir / f\"dataset_coverage_dashboard_{slug}_{stamp}.png\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 342
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 343,
            "text": "    fig, (ax0, ax1) = plt.subplots("
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 344,
            "text": "        2,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 345,
            "text": "        1,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 346,
            "text": "        figsize=(max(11.5, len(years) * 0.22), 8.4),"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 347,
            "text": "        gridspec_kw={\"height_ratios\": [2.15, 1.05], \"hspace\": 0.28},"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 348,
            "text": "    )"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 349
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 350,
            "text": "    _apply_analysis_window_shade(ax0, years, x, cfg)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 351,
            "text": "    ax0.plot("
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 352,
            "text": "        x,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 353,
            "text": "        detail[\"box_any_game_athletes\"],"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 354,
            "text": "        label=\"BOX — unique athletes (any game row)\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 355,
            "text": "        color=\"#2980b9\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 356,
            "text": "        lw=2.2,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 357,
            "text": "    )"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 358,
            "text": "    ax0.plot("
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 359,
            "text": "        x,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 360,
            "text": "        detail[\"box_minutes_gt0_athletes\"],"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 361,
            "text": "        label=\"BOX — unique athletes, Σminutes\u003e0 (PPM / &#96;minutes&#96; perf)\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 362,
            "text": "        color=\"#1abc9c\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 363,
            "text": "        lw=2.0,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 364,
            "text": "        ls=\"--\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 365,
            "text": "    )"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 366,
            "text": "    ax0.plot("
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 367,
            "text": "        x,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 368,
            "text": "        detail[\"sr_bpm_athletes\"],"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 369,
            "text": "        label=\"SR matched — BPM (OBPM/DBPM use same rows)\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 370,
            "text": "        color=\"#16a085\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 371,
            "text": "        lw=2.2,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 372,
            "text": "    )"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 373,
            "text": "    ax0.plot("
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 374,
            "text": "        x,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 375,
            "text": "        detail[\"box_sr_overlap_athletes\"],"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 376,
            "text": "        label=\"BOX∩SR — minute-positive \u0026 in matched file\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 377,
            "text": "        color=\"#8e44ad\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 378,
            "text": "        lw=1.9,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 379,
            "text": "        ls=\":\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 380,
            "text": "    )"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 381
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 382,
            "text": "    ax0b = ax0.twinx()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 383,
            "text": "    ax0b.bar("
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 384,
            "text": "        x,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 385,
            "text": "        detail[\"draft_picks\"],"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 386,
            "text": "        width=0.55,"
          }
        ],
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 460
          },
          "startPosition": {
            "column": 9,

        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./sports_pipeline/dataset_coverage.py",

    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 161,
            "text": "def export_plot_slug(cfg: Any) -\u003e str:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 162,
            "text": "    \"\"\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 163,
            "text": "    Filesystem-safe token for export filenames."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 164
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 165,
            "text": "    Suffixes may include: &#96;&#96;_poolqeqwidth&#96;&#96;, &#96;&#96;_zwithinseason&#96;&#96;, &#96;&#96;_tdalltime&#96;&#96; / &#96;&#96;_tdseason&#96;&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 166,
            "text": "    (team draftee restriction when &#96;&#96;restrict_teams_by_draftees&#96;&#96; is True)."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 167,
            "text": "    \"\"\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 168,
            "text": "    m = perf_metric_active(cfg).strip().lower()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 169,
            "text": "    if m not in _PERF_MAP:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 170,
            "text": "        m = re.sub(r\"[^a-z0-9]+\", \"_\", m)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 171,
            "text": "    safe = m.replace(\"/\", \"_\").replace(\"%\", \"pct\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 172,
            "text": "    if str(getattr(cfg, \"poolq_binning\", \"quantile\")).strip().lower() == \"equal_width\":"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 173,
            "text": "        safe = f\"{safe}_poolqeqwidth\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 174,
            "text": "    if bool(getattr(cfg, \"perf_zscore_within_season\", False)):"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 175,
            "text": "        safe = f\"{safe}_zwithinseason\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 176,
            "text": "    if bool(getattr(cfg, \"restrict_teams_by_draftees\", True)):"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 177,
            "text": "        dr = str(getattr(cfg, \"draftee_restriction\", \"all_time\")).strip().lower()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 178,
            "text": "        safe = f\"{safe}_tdseason\" if dr == \"season\" else f\"{safe}_tdalltime\""
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 179,
            "text": "    return safe"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 180
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 181
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 182,
            "text": "def perf_options_df() -\u003e pd.DataFrame:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 183,
            "text": "    \"\"\""
          }
        ],
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 200
          },
          "startPosition": {
            "column": 33,
            "line": 157
          }
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./sports_pipeline/perf_metric.py",
        "signatures": {}
      },
      "score": 0.20504486560821533
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 464,
            "text": "def plot_coverage_metric_heatmap("
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 465,
            "text": "    detail: pd.DataFrame,"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 466,
            "text": "    cfg: Any,"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 467,
            "text": "    *,"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 468,
            "text": "    show: bool = False,"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 469,
            "text": "    stamp: str | None = None,"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 470,
            "text": "    plot_slug: str | None = None,"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 471,
            "text": ") -\u003e Path:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 472,
            "text": "    \"\"\"Rows = datasets/metrics, columns = year; color = row-normalized intensity (shape comparison).\"\"\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 473,
            "text": "    import matplotlib.pyplot as plt"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 474
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 475,
            "text": "    years = detail[\"year\"].to_numpy(dtype=int)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 476,
            "text": "    row_labels = ["
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 477,
            "text": "        \"BOX any game\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 478,
            "text": "        \"BOX min\u003e0\\n(PPM/min perf)\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 479,
            "text": "        \"SR BPM\\n(OBPM/DBPM)\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 480,
            "text": "        \"BOX∩SR\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 481,
            "text": "        \"Draft register\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 482,
            "text": "    ]"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 483,
            "text": "    mat = np.vstack("
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 484,
            "text": "        ["
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 485,
            "text": "            detail[\"box_any_game_athletes\"].to_numpy(dtype=float),"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 486,
            "text": "            detail[\"box_minutes_gt0_athletes\"].to_numpy(dtype=float),"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 487,
            "text": "            detail[\"sr_bpm_athletes\"].to_numpy(dtype=float),"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 488,
            "text": "            detail[\"box_sr_overlap_athletes\"].to_numpy(dtype=float),"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 489,
            "text": "            detail[\"draft_picks\"].to_numpy(dtype=float),"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 490,
            "text": "        ]"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 491,
            "text": "    )"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 492,
            "text": "    row_max = mat.max(axis=1, keepdims=True)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 493,
            "text": "    row_max = np.where(row_max \u003c= 0, 1.0, row_max)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 494,
            "text": "    norm = mat / row_max"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 495
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 496,
            "text": "    out_dir = Path(getattr(cfg, \"exports_dir\", paths.mbb_dir() / \"exports_inverted_u_v0\"))"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 497,
            "text": "    out_dir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 498,
            "text": "    stamp = stamp or date.today().isoformat()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 499,
            "text": "    slug = plot_slug if plot_slug is not None else export_plot_slug(cfg)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 500,
            "text": "    png = out_dir / f\"dataset_coverage_heatmap_{slug}_{stamp}.png\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 501
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 502,
            "text": "    fig_w = max(12.0, len(years) * 0.18)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 503,
            "text": "    fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(fig_w, 4.2))"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 504,
            "text": "    im = ax.imshow(norm, aspect=\"auto\", cmap=\"YlGnBu\", vmin=0, vmax=1, interpolation=\"nearest\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 505,
            "text": "    ax.set_yticks(np.arange(len(row_labels)))"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 506,
            "text": "    ax.set_yticklabels(row_labels, fontsize=9)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 507,
            "text": "    step = 1 if len(years) \u003c= 30 else max(1, len(years) // 24)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 508,
            "text": "    xt = np.arange(0, len(years), step)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 509,
            "text": "    ax.set_xticks(xt)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 510,
            "text": "    ax.set_xticklabels([str(int(years[i])) for i in xt], rotation=45, ha=\"right\", fontsize=7)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 511,
            "text": "    ax.set_xlabel(\"Year (BOX/SR = season; bottom row = June draft year)\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 512,
            "text": "    ax.set_title(\"Relative coverage shape by year (each row scaled to its own max = 1)\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 513,
            "text": "    plt.colorbar(im, ax=ax, fraction=0.02, pad=0.02, label=\"Row-normalized\")"
          }
        ],
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 518
          },

            "lineNumber": 113,
            "text": "        self.perf_metric = normalize_perf_metric_list(self.perf_metric)"

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 115,

            "lineNumber": 116,
            "text": "        pb = str(self.poolq_binning).strip().lower()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 117,
            "text": "        if pb not in (\"quantile\", \"equal_width\"):"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 118,
            "text": "            raise ValueError("
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 119,
            "text": "                f\"poolq_binning must be 'quantile' or 'equal_width', got {self.poolq_binning!r}\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 120,
            "text": "            )"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 121,
            "text": "        self.poolq_binning = pb"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 122,
            "text": "        dr = str(self.draftee_restriction).strip().lower()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 123,
            "text": "        if dr not in (\"all_time\", \"season\"):"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 124,
            "text": "            raise ValueError("
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 125,
            "text": "                f\"draftee_restriction must be 'all_time' or 'season', got {self.draftee_restriction!r}\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 126,
            "text": "            )"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 127,
            "text": "        self.draftee_restriction = dr"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 128
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 129,
            "text": "    @property"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 130,
            "text": "    def perf_measure_label(self) -\u003e str:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 131,

            "lineNumber": 132,
            "text": "        return plot_label_for_metric(perf_metric_active(self))"

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 25,
            "text": "@dataclass"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 26,
            "text": "class PipelineConfig:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 72
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 73
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 74,
            "text": "    # --- SR refresh (&#96;&#96;conductor.run_conductor&#96;&#96; — only if &#96;&#96;run_sr_refresh&#96;&#96;) ----------"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 75,
            "text": "    #: If True, run crosswalk / jobs / optional scrape / match before final panel merge."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 76,
            "text": "    run_sr_refresh: bool = False"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 77,
            "text": "    sr_refresh_do_crosswalk: bool = True"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 78,
            "text": "    sr_refresh_do_scrape_jobs: bool = True"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 79,
            "text": "    #: Network fetch to SR (needs &#96;&#96;pip install -e '.[scrape]'&#96;&#96;)."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 80,
            "text": "    sr_refresh_do_scrape: bool = False"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 81,
            "text": "    sr_refresh_do_match: bool = True"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 82
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 83,
            "text": "    # --- Conductor steps (&#96;&#96;conductor.run_conductor&#96;&#96;) ---------------------------------"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 84,
            "text": "    #: Print ingest/draft/SR stub dicts (usually leave False)."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 85,
            "text": "    run_stage3_status: bool = False"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 86,
            "text": "    run_data_integrity_report: bool = True"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 87,
            "text": "    run_yearly_coverage_chart: bool = True"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 88,
            "text": "    run_ventile_eda: bool = True"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 89,
            "text": "    run_dirty_lpm: bool = True"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 90,
            "text": "    #: After a successful run, write &#96;&#96;PANEL&#96;&#96; to CSV (default path: canonical panel file)."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 91,
            "text": "    export_panel_after_run: bool = False"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 92,
            "text": "    export_panel_dest: Path | None = None"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 93
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 94,
            "text": "    # --- Data integrity report (&#96;data_integrity.summarize_data_integrity&#96;) ------------"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 95,
            "text": "    #: If both set, collegiate season window for the report; else min/max seasons from plot subset &#96;use&#96;."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 96,
            "text": "    analysis_season_min: int | None = None"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 97,
            "text": "    analysis_season_max: int | None = None"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 98,
            "text": "    #: Draft-year band for match-rate denominators: [season_min - before, season_max + after]."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 99,
            "text": "    draft_year_before_season: int = 1"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 100,
            "text": "    draft_year_after_season: int = 5"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 101
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 102,
            "text": "    # --- Stage toggles (stubs until ingest/draft/SR code is ported) --------------------"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 103,
            "text": "    run_spine_refresh: bool = False"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 104,
            "text": "    run_draft_match: bool = False"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 105,
            "text": "    #: If True, &#96;sr_bpm.run&#96; calls &#96;scrape_bpm.run_batch&#96; (needs &#96;pip install -e .[scrape]&#96;)."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 106,
            "text": "    run_sr_scrape: bool = False"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 107,
            "text": "    #: Optional contact string embedded in the scraper User-Agent (email or URL)."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 108,
            "text": "    sr_scrape_contact: str | None = None"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 109,
            "text": "    #: Cap pages per conductor run (&#96;None&#96; = no cap; useful for testing throttles)."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 110,
            "text": "    sr_scrape_max_fetches: int | None = None"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 111
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 112,
            "text": "    def __post_init__(self) -\u003e None:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 113,
            "text": "        self.perf_metric = normalize_perf_metric_list(self.perf_metric)"
          }
        ],
