    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 205,
            "text": "def plot_yearly_coverage_grouped("
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 206,
            "text": "    tab: pd.DataFrame,"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 207,
            "text": "    cfg: Any,"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 208,
            "text": "    *,"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 209,
            "text": "    show: bool = True,"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 210,
            "text": "    stamp: str | None = None,"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 211,
            "text": "    plot_slug: str | None = None,"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 212,
            "text": ") -\u003e Path:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 213,
            "text": "    \"\"\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 214,
            "text": "    Grouped bar chart: three bars per year (BOX, DRAFT, SR). Saves PNG under &#96;&#96;cfg.exports_dir&#96;&#96;."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 215
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 216,
            "text": "    If &#96;&#96;cfg.analysis_season_min&#96;&#96; and &#96;&#96;cfg.analysis_season_max&#96;&#96; are both set, shades"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 217,
            "text": "    that year band (by **season** index on the x-axis)."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 218,
            "text": "    \"\"\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 219,
            "text": "    import matplotlib.pyplot as plt"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 220
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 221,
            "text": "    years = tab[\"year\"].to_numpy()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 222,
            "text": "    x = np.arange(len(years), dtype=float)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 223,
            "text": "    w = 0.25"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 224,
            "text": "    out_dir = Path(getattr(cfg, \"exports_dir\", paths.mbb_dir() / \"exports_inverted_u_v0\"))"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 225,
            "text": "    out_dir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 226,
            "text": "    stamp = stamp or date.today().isoformat()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 227,
            "text": "    slug = plot_slug if plot_slug is not None else export_plot_slug(cfg)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 228,
            "text": "    png = out_dir / f\"dataset_coverage_by_year_{slug}_{stamp}.png\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 229
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 230,
            "text": "    fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(max(11.0, len(years) * 0.22), 5.8))"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 231,
            "text": "    ax.bar("
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 232,
            "text": "        x - w,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 233,
            "text": "        tab[\"box_players\"],"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 234,
            "text": "        width=w,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 235,
            "text": "        label=\"BOX — unique athletes per collegiate season\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 236,
            "text": "        color=\"#2980b9\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 237,
            "text": "        edgecolor=\"white\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 238,
            "text": "        linewidth=0.4,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 239,
            "text": "    )"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 240,
            "text": "    ax.bar("
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 241,
            "text": "        x,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 242,
            "text": "        tab[\"draft_picks\"],"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 243,
            "text": "        width=w,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 244,
            "text": "        label=\"DRAFT — register rows per NBA draft year\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 245,
            "text": "        color=\"#c0392b\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 246,
            "text": "        edgecolor=\"white\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 247,
            "text": "        linewidth=0.4,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 248,
            "text": "    )"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 249,
            "text": "    ax.bar("
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 250,
            "text": "        x + w,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 251,
            "text": "        tab[\"sr_players\"],"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 252,
            "text": "        width=w,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 253,
            "text": "        label=\"SR — unique athletes per season (BPM matched)\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 254,
            "text": "        color=\"#16a085\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 255,
            "text": "        edgecolor=\"white\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 256,
            "text": "        linewidth=0.4,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 257,
            "text": "    )"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 258
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 259,
            "text": "    lo = getattr(cfg, \"analysis_season_min\", None)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 260,
            "text": "    hi = getattr(cfg, \"analysis_season_max\", None)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 261,
            "text": "    if lo is not None and hi is not None:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 262,
            "text": "        in_win = (years \u003e= int(lo)) \u0026 (years \u003c= int(hi))"
          }
        ],

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 205,
            "text": "def ventile_provenance_lines("
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 206,
            "text": "    use: pd.DataFrame,"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 207,
            "text": "    cfg: Any,"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 208,
            "text": "    bin_tab: pd.DataFrame,"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 209,
            "text": ") -\u003e list[str]:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 249
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 250,
            "text": "    if lo is not None and hi is not None:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 251,
            "text": "        lines.append("
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 252,
            "text": "            f\"CFG analysis_season_min/max: {int(lo)}–{int(hi)} \""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 253,
            "text": "            f\"(plot sample uses all seasons with valid rows unless you filter upstream).\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 254,
            "text": "        )"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 255
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 256,
            "text": "    lines.append("
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 257,
            "text": "        f\"ESPN box: panel built from game-level box; collegiate season span on sample rows: {slo}–{shi}.\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 258,
            "text": "    )"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 259
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 260,
            "text": "    reg_p = paths.nbaplayersdraft_csv()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 261,
            "text": "    if reg_p.is_file():"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 262,
            "text": "        reg = pd.read_csv(reg_p, usecols=[\"year\"], low_memory=False)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 263,
            "text": "        reg = reg.dropna(subset=[\"year\"])"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 264,
            "text": "        if len(reg):"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 265,
            "text": "            ry = reg[\"year\"].astype(int)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 266,
            "text": "            lines.append("
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 267,
            "text": "                f\"NBA draft register (nbaplayersdraft.csv): draft &#96;year&#96; in file {int(ry.min())}–{int(ry.max())}.\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 268,
            "text": "            )"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 269
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 270,
            "text": "    lu_path = paths.draft_lookup_csv()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 271,
            "text": "    if lu_path.is_file():"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 272,
            "text": "        lu = pd.read_csv(lu_path, usecols=[\"athlete_id\", \"draft_year\"], low_memory=False)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 273,
            "text": "        lu[\"athlete_id\"] = pd.to_numeric(lu[\"athlete_id\"], errors=\"coerce\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 274,
            "text": "        lu = lu.dropna(subset=[\"athlete_id\"])"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 275,
            "text": "        lu[\"athlete_id\"] = lu[\"athlete_id\"].astype(int)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 276,
            "text": "        ids = set(use[\"athlete_id\"].astype(int))"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 277,
            "text": "        hit = lu.loc[lu[\"athlete_id\"].isin(ids)]"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 278,
            "text": "        hit = hit.dropna(subset=[\"draft_year\"])"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 279,
            "text": "        if len(hit):"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 280,
            "text": "            dy = hit[\"draft_year\"].astype(int)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 281,
            "text": "            lines.append("
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 282,
            "text": "                f\"Draft lookup (athlete_id_draft_lookup): NBA draft years {int(dy.min())}–{int(dy.max())} \""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 283,
            "text": "                f\"among lookup rows whose athlete_id appears in this sample (n_lookup_rows={len(hit):,}).\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 284,
            "text": "            )"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 285,
            "text": "        n_d1 = int((use[\"Y_draft\"] == 1).sum())"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 286,
            "text": "        lines.append(f\"Draft outcome on sample: Y_draft=1 on {n_d1:,} player-seasons (ever-draft flag).\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 287
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 288,
            "text": "    metric = perf_metric_active(cfg).strip().lower()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 289,
            "text": "    try:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 290,
            "text": "        _, col = resolve_perf_metric(metric)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 291,
            "text": "    except ValueError:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 292,
            "text": "        col = \"minutes\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 293,
            "text": "    if col in (\"BPM\", \"OBPM\", \"DBPM\"):"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 294,
            "text": "        if col in use.columns:"
          }
        ],

<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>
**Analyzing season filtering**

I confirmed that `filter_panel` doesn't apply analysis season limits, so actual sample seasons are determined by remaining data after panel build and other filters. I discovered that the window in data integrity report overrides computed min/max values and is used only for visual shading on coverage plots, not for subsetting modeling data. </details></think>

_**Agent (default)**_

Here is how the two pairs differ in **your** codebase.

## `panel_season_min` / `panel_season_max` — **what goes into the panel**

Used only when the panel is **built from the ESPN box** in `panel_rebuild.build_from_box`: game-level rows are **filtered to those collegiate seasons** before aggregation to player–season–team and the rest of the merge.

- **`None` / `None`** → every season present in `mbb_df_player_box.csv` is eligible.
- Set e.g. **2011–2021** → only those seasons are read from box and carried into the rebuilt panel.

They do **not** apply when you load a prebuilt `player_season_panel_530.csv` (`use_prebuilt_panel_csv=True`): that file is whatever was exported earlier; there is no second trim by `panel_season_*` on load.

## `analysis_season_min` / `analysis_season_max` — **reporting and charts, not row filtering**

`filter_panel` (ventiles, LPM, integrity **`use`** sample) **does not** filter by these. So they do **not** change which rows enter the inverted‑U / LPM sample.

Where they **do** matter:

1. **`data_integrity.summarize_data_integrity`** — If **both** are set, the printed “analysis window” collegiate seasons are **forced to that band** for the narrative and for the derived **draft-year window** (`draft_year_before_season` / `draft_year_after_season` are applied to that band). If either is `None`, the window is taken from the **actual** min/max `season` in `filter_panel(panel, cfg)`.

2. **`dataset_coverage`** — If **both** are set, the yearly coverage figures get a **shaded band** on the x-axis for that season range (a visual “this is the window I care about”).

3. **`ventile_provenance_lines`** — Adds an extra provenance line when both are set, noting that you configured that window (and that the plot sample is still “all valid rows” unless you restricted upstream, e.g. via panel rebuild).

So in one sentence: **`panel_season_*` constrains the data at panel construction from box; `analysis_season_*` mainly documents and highlights a season band in integrity + coverage, without subsetting the ventile/LPM dataframe** unless you align things yourself (e.g. rebuild the panel with `panel_season_*` so the panel only contains those years).

---

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3,
            "text": "# ============================================================================="
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4,
            "text": "# Splits the sample into ~20 equal-count bins on poolq_loo (ventiles when unique values allow)."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 5,
            "text": "# Left panel: mean Y_draft vs bin index (1 = lowest teammate pool quality)."

          },

            "lineNumber": 7
          },

            "lineNumber": 8,
            "text": "dfp = g.dropna(subset=[\"poolq_loo\", \"Y_draft\"]).copy()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 9,
            "text": "# qcut with duplicates=\"drop\" handles ties at bin edges (can yield \u003c20 bins)."

            "lineNumber": 10,

        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./sports_pipeline/panel_build.py",
        "signatures": {}
      },
      "score": 0.4015966057777405
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 736,
            "text": "      \"text/plain\": ["
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 737,
            "text": "       \"\u003cFigure size 1100x400 with 2 Axes\u003e\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 738,
            "text": "      ]"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 739,
            "text": "     },"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 740,
            "text": "     \"metadata\": {},"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 741,
            "text": "     \"output_type\": \"display_data\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 742,
            "text": "    }"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 743,
            "text": "   ],"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 744,
            "text": "   \"source\": ["
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 745,
            "text": "    \"# =============================================================================\\n\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 746,
            "text": "    \"# CELL 11: Nonparametric EDA — draft rate by ventile of LOO pool quality\\n\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 747,
            "text": "    \"# =============================================================================\\n\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 748,
            "text": "    \"# Splits the sample into ~20 equal-count bins on poolq_loo (ventiles when unique values allow).\\n\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 749,
            "text": "    \"# Left panel: mean Y_draft vs bin index (1 = lowest teammate pool quality).\\n\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 750,
            "text": "    \"# Right panel: same means vs median poolq_loo inside each bin (actual x-scale).\\n\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 751,
            "text": "    \"\\n\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 752,
            "text": "    \"dfp = g.dropna(subset=[\\\"poolq_loo\\\", \\\"Y_draft\\\"]).copy()\\n\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 753,
            "text": "    \"# qcut with duplicates=\\\"drop\\\" handles ties at bin edges (can yield \u003c20 bins).\\n\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 754,
            "text": "    \"dfp[\\\"poolq_bin\\\"] = pd.qcut(dfp[\\\"poolq_loo\\\"], q=20, duplicates=\\\"drop\\\")\\n\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 755,
            "text": "    \"\\n\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 756,
            "text": "    \"binned = (\\n\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 757,
            "text": "    \"    dfp.groupby(\\\"poolq_bin\\\", observed=True)\\n\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 758,
            "text": "    \"    .agg(\\n\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 759,
            "text": "    \"        mean_y_draft=(\\\"Y_draft\\\", \\\"mean\\\"),\\n\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 760,
            "text": "    \"        n=(\\\"Y_draft\\\", \\\"size\\\"),\\n\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 761,
            "text": "    \"        poolq_loo_mid=(\\\"poolq_loo\\\", \\\"median\\\"),\\n\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 762,
            "text": "    \"        poolq_loo_lo=(\\\"poolq_loo\\\", \\\"min\\\"),\\n\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 763,
            "text": "    \"        poolq_loo_hi=(\\\"poolq_loo\\\", \\\"max\\\"),\\n\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 764,
            "text": "    \"    )\\n\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 765,
            "text": "    \"    .reset_index()\\n\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 766,
            "text": "    \")\\n\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 767,
            "text": "    \"binned[\\\"bin_i\\\"] = range(1, len(binned) + 1)\\n\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 768,
            "text": "    \"\\n\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 769,
            "text": "    \"print(binned[[\\\"bin_i\\\", \\\"poolq_loo_lo\\\", \\\"poolq_loo_hi\\\", \\\"n\\\", \\\"mean_y_draft\\\"]].to_string(index=False))\\n\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 770,
            "text": "    \"\\n\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 771,
            "text": "    \"fig, axes = plt.subplots(1, 2, figsize=(11, 4))\\n\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 772,
            "text": "    \"\\n\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 773,
            "text": "    \"ax = axes[0]\\n\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 774,
            "text": "    \"ax.bar(binned[\\\"bin_i\\\"], binned[\\\"mean_y_draft\\\"], color=\\\"steelblue\\\", edgecolor=\\\"white\\\", linewidth=0.4)\\n\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 775,
            "text": "    \"ax.set_xlabel(\\\"Ventile bin (1 = lowest poolq_loo)\\\")\\n\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 776,
            "text": "    \"ax.set_ylabel(\\\"Mean Y_draft\\\")\\n\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 777,
            "text": "    \"ax.set_title(\\\"Mean draft rate by ventile of poolq_loo (LOO teammate perf)\\\")\\n\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 778,
            "text": "    \"\\n\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 779,
            "text": "    \"ax = axes[1]\\n\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 780,
            "text": "    \"ax.plot(binned[\\\"poolq_loo_mid\\\"], binned[\\\"mean_y_draft\\\"], marker=\\\"o\\\", ms=4, color=\\\"steelblue\\\")\\n\","
          }
        ],
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 780
          },
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 735
          }
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./obsolete_files/sports_gameplan_old/530_sports_pipeline_bkup.ipynb",
        "signatures": {}
      },
      "score": 0.378063440322876
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 183,
            "text": "def ventile_table(df: pd.DataFrame, cfg: Any) -\u003e pd.DataFrame:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 184,
            "text": "    \"\"\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 185,
            "text": "    Bin &#96;&#96;poolq_loo&#96;&#96; (quantile or equal-width per &#96;&#96;cfg.poolq_binning&#96;&#96;); within each bin,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 186,
            "text": "    mean &#96;&#96;Y_draft&#96;&#96; = empirical draft rate. Column &#96;&#96;vent&#96;&#96; is the bin index (0 = lowest poolq)."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 187,
            "text": "    \"\"\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 188,
            "text": "    q = int(getattr(cfg, \"ventiles\", 20))"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 189,
            "text": "    mode = str(getattr(cfg, \"poolq_binning\", \"quantile\")).strip().lower()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 190,
            "text": "    work = df.copy()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 191,
            "text": "    work[\"vent\"] = assign_poolq_bin_labels(work[\"poolq_loo\"], q, mode)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 192,
            "text": "    return ("
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 193,
            "text": "        work.dropna(subset=[\"vent\"])"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 194,
            "text": "        .groupby(\"vent\", observed=True)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 195,
            "text": "        .agg("
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 196,
            "text": "            n=(\"Y_draft\", \"size\"),"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 197,
            "text": "            draft_rate=(\"Y_draft\", \"mean\"),"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 198,
            "text": "            poolq_mean=(\"poolq_loo\", \"mean\"),"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 199,
            "text": "        )"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 200,
            "text": "        .reset_index()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 201,
            "text": "        .sort_values(\"vent\")"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 202,
            "text": "    )"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 203
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 204
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 205,
            "text": "def draftee_filter_plot_title_line(cfg: Any) -\u003e str:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 206,
            "text": "    \"\"\""
          }
        ],
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 209
          },
          "startPosition": {
            "column": 69,
            "line": 179
          }
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./sports_pipeline/panel_build.py",
        "signatures": {}
      },
      "score": 0.3750391900539398
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 475,
            "text": "def run_ventile_eda(df: pd.DataFrame, cfg: Any) -\u003e tuple[pd.DataFrame, Path]:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 476,
            "text": "    \"\"\"Filter → binned table CSV → ventile PNG (with optional quadratic overlay).\"\"\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 477,
            "text": "    use = filter_panel(df, cfg)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 478,
            "text": "    bin_tab = ventile_table(use, cfg)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 479,
            "text": "    out_dir = Path(getattr(cfg, \"exports_dir\", paths.mbb_dir() / \"exports_inverted_u_v0\"))"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 480,
            "text": "    out_dir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 481,
            "text": "    stamp = date.today().isoformat()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 482,
            "text": "    plot_slug = export_plot_slug(cfg)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 483,
            "text": "    csv_path = out_dir / f\"binned_draft_rate_ventiles_{plot_slug}_{stamp}.csv\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 484,
            "text": "    bin_tab.to_csv(csv_path, index=False)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 485
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 486,
            "text": "    prov_lines = ventile_provenance_lines(use, cfg, bin_tab) if len(use) else []"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 487,
            "text": "    prov_path = out_dir / f\"ventile_eda_provenance_{plot_slug}_{stamp}.txt\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 488,
            "text": "    prov_path.write_text(\"\\n\".join(prov_lines) + \"\\n\", encoding=\"utf-8\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 489,
            "text": "    print(\"--- Ventile EDA — sample / datasets / per-ventile n ---\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 490,
            "text": "    print(\"\\n\".join(prov_lines))"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 491,
            "text": "    print(f\"(Also wrote {prov_path.name})\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 492,
            "text": "    print()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 493
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 494,
            "text": "    png_path = ventile_plot("
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 495,
            "text": "        bin_tab, cfg, len(use), use=use, provenance_lines=prov_lines if prov_lines else None"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 496,
            "text": "    )"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 497,
            "text": "    return bin_tab, png_path"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 498
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 499
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 500,
            "text": "def run_dirty_lpm(df: pd.DataFrame, cfg: Any) -\u003e Any | pd.Series:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 501,
            "text": "    \"\"\""
          }
        ],
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 509
          },
          "startPosition": {
            "column": 14,
            "line": 471
          }
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./sports_pipeline/panel_build.py",
        "signatures": {}
      },
      "score": 0.3739359378814697
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 343,
            "text": "def ventile_plot("
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 344,
            "text": "    bin_tab: pd.DataFrame,"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 345,
            "text": "    cfg: Any,"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 346,
            "text": "    n_rows: int,"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 347,
            "text": "    use: pd.DataFrame | None = None,"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 348,
            "text": "    *,"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 349,
            "text": "    provenance_lines: list[str] | None = None,"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 350,
            "text": "    show: bool = True,"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 351,
            "text": ") -\u003e Path:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 379
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 380
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 381,
            "text": "    if provenance:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 382,
            "text": "        wrapped_blocks: list[str] = []"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 383,
            "text": "        for ln in provenance:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 384,
            "text": "            if ln.strip() == \"\":"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 385,
            "text": "                wrapped_blocks.append(\"\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 386,
            "text": "            elif ln.startswith(\"  \"):"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 387,
            "text": "                wrapped_blocks.append(ln)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 388,
            "text": "            else:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 389,
            "text": "                wrapped_blocks.append("
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 390,
            "text": "                    textwrap.fill(ln, width=104, break_long_words=False, break_on_hyphens=False)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 391,
            "text": "                )"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 392,
            "text": "        cap = \"\\n\".join(wrapped_blocks)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 393,
            "text": "        # Tight plot + caption: avoid a tall empty band under the text; bbox_inches='tight' trims margins."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 394,
            "text": "        fig = plt.figure(figsize=(8.2, 6.0), constrained_layout=True)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 395,
            "text": "        gs = fig.add_gridspec(2, 1, height_ratios=[3.15, 1.0])"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 396,
            "text": "        ax = fig.add_subplot(gs[0, 0])"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 397,
            "text": "        ax_cap = fig.add_subplot(gs[1, 0])"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 398,
            "text": "        ax_cap.axis(\"off\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 399,
            "text": "        ax_cap.text("
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 400,
            "text": "            0.0,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 401,
            "text": "            1.0,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 402,
            "text": "            cap,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 403,
            "text": "            transform=ax_cap.transAxes,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 404,
            "text": "            va=\"top\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 405,
            "text": "            ha=\"left\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 406,
            "text": "            fontsize=6.65,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 407,
            "text": "            linespacing=1.12,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 408,
            "text": "            family=\"sans-serif\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 409,
            "text": "        )"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 410,
            "text": "    else:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 411,
            "text": "        fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(8.2, 5.5))"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 412
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 413,
            "text": "    ax.plot("
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 414,
            "text": "        bin_tab[\"poolq_mean\"],"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 415,
            "text": "        bin_tab[\"draft_rate\"],"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 416,
            "text": "        marker=\"o\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 417,
            "text": "        ms=4,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 418,
            "text": "        label=\"Ventile means\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 419,
            "text": "    )"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 420,
            "text": "    z_sc = bool(getattr(cfg, \"perf_zscore_within_season\", False))"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 421,
            "text": "    poolq_x = ("
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 422,
            "text": "        \"Mean teammate pool quality within ventile (poolq_loo, leave-one-out on perf)\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 423,
            "text": "        + (\" — SD units within season\" if z_sc else \"\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 424,
            "text": "    )"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 425,
            "text": "    ax.set_xlabel(poolq_x)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 426,
            "text": "    ax.set_ylabel(\"Draft rate (mean Y_draft)\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 427,
            "text": "    z_line = \"\\nperf z-scored within collegiate season before LOO\" if z_sc else \"\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 428,
            "text": "    draftee_line = draftee_filter_plot_title_line(cfg)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 429,
            "text": "    ax.set_title("
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 430,
            "text": "        f\"Draft rate vs pool quality — {bin_title} (n={n_rows:,} player-seasons)\\n\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 431,
            "text": "        f\"Performance measure: {perf_lbl}{z_line}\\n\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 432,
            "text": "        f\"{draftee_line}\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 433,
            "text": "        fontsize=11,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 434,
            "text": "    )"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 435,
            "text": "    show_quad = bool(getattr(cfg, \"show_quadratic_lpm_on_eda_plot\", True))"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 436,
            "text": "    if show_quad and use is not None and len(use) \u003e 50:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 437,
            "text": "        b = draft_poolq_quadratic_coeffs(use)"
          }
        ],
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 471
          },
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 342
          }
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./sports_pipeline/panel_build.py",
        "signatures": {
          "ranges": [
            {
              "endPosition": {
                "column": 5,
                "line": 352
              },
              "startPosition": {
                "column": 1,
                "line": 343
              }
            }
          ]
        }
      },
      "score": 0.3613520860671997
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 205,
            "text": "def plot_yearly_coverage_grouped("
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 206,
            "text": "    tab: pd.DataFrame,"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 207,
            "text": "    cfg: Any,"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 208,
            "text": "    *,"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 209,
            "text": "    show: bool = True,"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 210,
            "text": "    stamp: str | None = None,"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 211,
            "text": "    plot_slug: str | None = None,"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 212,
            "text": ") -\u003e Path:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 213,
            "text": "    \"\"\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 214,
            "text": "    Grouped bar chart: three bars per year (BOX, DRAFT, SR). Saves PNG under &#96;&#96;cfg.exports_dir&#96;&#96;."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 215
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 216,
            "text": "    If &#96;&#96;cfg.analysis_season_min&#96;&#96; and &#96;&#96;cfg.analysis_season_max&#96;&#96; are both set, shades"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 217,
            "text": "    that year band (by **season** index on the x-axis)."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 218,
            "text": "    \"\"\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 219,
            "text": "    import matplotlib.pyplot as plt"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 220
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 221,
            "text": "    years = tab[\"year\"].to_numpy()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 222,
            "text": "    x = np.arange(len(years), dtype=float)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 223,
            "text": "    w = 0.25"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 224,
            "text": "    out_dir = Path(getattr(cfg, \"exports_dir\", paths.mbb_dir() / \"exports_inverted_u_v0\"))"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 225,
            "text": "    out_dir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 226,
            "text": "    stamp = stamp or date.today().isoformat()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 227,
            "text": "    slug = plot_slug if plot_slug is not None else export_plot_slug(cfg)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 228,
            "text": "    png = out_dir / f\"dataset_coverage_by_year_{slug}_{stamp}.png\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 229
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 230,

      "codeBlock": {

          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 934,
            "text": "def plot_competing_risks_cif_bars("
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 935,
            "text": "    plot_df,"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 936,
            "text": "    plot_spec,"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 937,
            "text": "    metadata,"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 938,
            "text": "    output_dir=None,"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 939,
            "text": "    filename_base=None,"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 940,
            "text": "    dpi=400,"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 941,
            "text": "    figsize=(10, 9),"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 942,
            "text": "    tick_sz=None,"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 943,
            "text": "    legend_outside=True,"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 944,
            "text": "):"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 945,
            "text": "    \"\"\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 946,
            "text": "    Plot bar charts of final CIF by bin for promotion and attrition."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 947
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 948,
            "text": "    Bars are ordered by the mean of the plotted variable (ascending),"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 949,
            "text": "    which yields z-score ascending order when plotting z-scored variables."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 950
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 951,
            "text": "    If &#96;&#96;plot_spec['cr_color_mode']&#96;&#96; is one of &#96;&#96;set1&#96;&#96; / &#96;&#96;tab20&#96;&#96; / &#96;&#96;husl&#96;&#96; / &#96;&#96;glasbey&#96;&#96;,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 952,
            "text": "    bar colors match the competing-risks curves (via &#96;&#96;cr_discrete_group_colors&#96;&#96;). Otherwise"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 953,
            "text": "    the blue/orange gradient from &#96;&#96;cif_bar_palette*&#96;&#96; is used."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 954
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 955,
            "text": "    &#96;&#96;plot_spec['cif_bar_xtick_labels']&#96;&#96;: &#96;&#96;'group'&#96;&#96; (division names), &#96;&#96;'quantile'&#96;&#96; (Q1..Qn),"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 956,
            "text": "    or &#96;&#96;None&#96;&#96; for auto: group labels when &#96;&#96;group_only_curves&#96;&#96; and &#96;&#96;group_by&#96;&#96; are set."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 957,
            "text": "    \"\"\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 958,
            "text": "    if plot_df is None or plot_df.empty:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 959,
            "text": "        print(\"⚠️ No data for CIF bar plots.\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 960,
            "text": "        return None"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 961
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 962,
            "text": "    var_name = plot_spec.get(\"variable\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 963,
            "text": "    group_col = \"plot_group\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 964,
            "text": "    if group_col not in plot_df.columns:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 965,
            "text": "        print(\"⚠️ plot_group missing; cannot build CIF bars.\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 966,
            "text": "        return None"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 967
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 968,
            "text": "    # Compute per-group stats"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 969,
            "text": "    group_stats = []"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 970,
            "text": "    for group, gdf in plot_df.groupby(group_col):"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 971,
            "text": "        # Match competing-risks filtering: require valid stop time"
          }
        ],
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 1205
          },
          "startPosition": {
            "column": 22,
            "line": 930
          }
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./cox_plot_helpers.py",
        "signatures": {}
      },

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 343,
            "text": "def ventile_plot("
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 344,
            "text": "    bin_tab: pd.DataFrame,"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 345,
            "text": "    cfg: Any,"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 346,
            "text": "    n_rows: int,"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 347,
            "text": "    use: pd.DataFrame | None = None,"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 348,
            "text": "    *,"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 349,
            "text": "    provenance_lines: list[str] | None = None,"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 350,
            "text": "    show: bool = True,"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 351,
            "text": ") -\u003e Path:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 435
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 436,
            "text": "    if show_quad and use is not None and len(use) \u003e 50:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 437,
            "text": "        b = draft_poolq_quadratic_coeffs(use)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 438,
            "text": "        if b is not None and len(b) == 3:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 439,
            "text": "            pq_m = bin_tab[\"poolq_mean\"].astype(float)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 440,
            "text": "            lo = float(pq_m.min())"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 441,
            "text": "            hi = float(pq_m.max())"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 442,
            "text": "            span = hi - lo if hi \u003e lo else 1.0"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 443,
            "text": "            pad = max(span * 0.04, 0.05)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 444,
            "text": "            xs = np.linspace(lo - pad, hi + pad, 200)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 445,
            "text": "            yhat = ("
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 446,
            "text": "                float(b[\"const\"])"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 447,
            "text": "                + float(b[\"poolq_loo\"]) * xs"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 448,
            "text": "                + float(b[\"poolq_sq\"]) * (xs**2)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 449,
            "text": "            )"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 450,
            "text": "            ax.plot("
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 451,
            "text": "                xs,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 452,
            "text": "                np.clip(yhat, 0.0, 1.0),"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 453,
            "text": "                color=\"C1\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 454,
            "text": "                linestyle=\"--\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 455,
            "text": "                linewidth=2,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 456,
            "text": "                alpha=0.9,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 457,
            "text": "                label=\"LPM (OLS) over ventile poolq range — E[draft|poolq] ≈ β₀+β₁·poolq+β₂·poolq²\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 458,
            "text": "            )"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 459,
            "text": "            ax.set_xlim(lo - pad, hi + pad)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 460,
            "text": "    ax.legend(loc=\"best\", fontsize=9)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 461,
            "text": "    ax.grid(True, alpha=0.3)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 462
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 463,
            "text": "    if not provenance:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 464,
            "text": "        fig.tight_layout()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 465
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 466,
            "text": "    plot_slug = export_plot_slug(cfg)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 467,
            "text": "    png = out_dir / f\"inverted_u_ventiles_{plot_slug}_{stamp}.png\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 468,
            "text": "    fig.savefig(png, dpi=150, bbox_inches=\"tight\", pad_inches=0.14)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 469,
            "text": "    if show:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 470,
            "text": "        plt.show()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 471,
            "text": "    plt.close(fig)"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 472,
            "text": "    return png"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 473
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 474
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 475,
            "text": "def run_ventile_eda(df: pd.DataFrame, cfg: Any) -\u003e tuple[pd.DataFrame, Path]:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 476,
            "text": "    "
          }
        ],
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 496
          },
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 342
          }
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./sports_pipeline/panel_build.py",
        "signatures": {
          "ranges": [
            {
              "endPosition": {
                "column": 5,
                "line": 352
              },
              "startPosition": {
                "column": 1,
                "line": 343
              }

          ]
        }
      },
      "score": 0.3441067039966583

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 821,
            "text": "def plot_var_distribution("
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 822,
            "text": "    series,"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 823,
            "text": "    label,"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 824,
            "text": "    bins='fd',"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 825,
            "text": "    min_bins=10,"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 826,
            "text": "    max_bins=60,"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 827,
            "text": "    color='steelblue',"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 828,
            "text": "    log_x=False,"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 829,
            "text": "    log_y=False,"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 830,
            "text": "    output_dir=None,"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 831,
            "text": "    filename=None,"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 832,
            "text": "    dpi=300,"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 833,
            "text": "):"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 834,
            "text": "    \"\"\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 835,
            "text": "    Plot a professional histogram with summary stats."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 836
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 837,
            "text": "    Args:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 838,
            "text": "        series: Pandas Series or array-like"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 839,
            "text": "        label: Axis/title label"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 840,
            "text": "        bins: 'fd', 'scott', 'sturges', or int"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 841,
            "text": "        min_bins: Minimum number of bins when using a rule"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 842,
            "text": "        max_bins: Maximum number of bins when using a rule"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 843,
            "text": "        color: Histogram color"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 844,
            "text": "        log_x: If True, use log scale on x-axis (drops nonpositive values)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 845,
            "text": "        log_y: If True, use log scale on y-axis"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 846,
            "text": "        output_dir: Optional directory to save the plot"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 847,
            "text": "        filename: Optional filename (without extension if you prefer)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 848,
            "text": "        dpi: Image resolution when saving"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 849,
            "text": "    \"\"\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 850,
            "text": "    if series is None:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 851,
            "text": "        print(f\"⚠️ No data for distribution: {label}\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 852,
            "text": "        return"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 853
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 854,
            "text": "    s = pd.to_numeric(pd.Series(series), errors='coerce').dropna()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 855,
            "text": "    if log_x:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 856,
            "text": "        nonpos = (s \u003c= 0).sum()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 857,
            "text": "        if nonpos:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 858,
            "text": "            print(f\"⚠️ Dropping {nonpos:,} nonpositive values for log-x: {label}\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 859,
            "text": "        s = s[s \u003e 0]"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 860,
            "text": "    if s.empty:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 861,
            "text": "        print(f\"⚠️ No non-null values for distribution: {label}\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 862,
            "text": "        return"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 863
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 864,
            "text": "    mean_val = s.mean()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 865,
            "text": "    median_val = s.median()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 866,
            "text": "    p05, p95 = np.percentile(s, [5, 95])"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 867,
            "text": "    # Determine bin edges"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 868,
            "text": "    if isinstance(bins, str):"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 869,
            "text": "        edges = np.histogram_bin_edges(s, bins=bins)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 870,
            "text": "        n_bins = max(1, len(edges) - 1)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 871,
            "text": "        if min_bins is not None:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 872,
            "text": "            n_bins = max(n_bins, int(min_bins))"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 873,
            "text": "        if max_bins is not None:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 874,
            "text": "            n_bins = min(n_bins, int(max_bins))"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 875,
            "text": "        edges = np.linspace(s.min(), s.max(), n_bins + 1)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 876,
            "text": "        hist_bins = edges"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 877,
            "text": "    else:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 878,
            "text": "        hist_bins = bins"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 879
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 880,
            "text": "    fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(8, 5))"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 881,
            "text": "    ax.hist(s, bins=hist_bins, color=color, alpha=0.75, edgecolor='white', linewidth=0.8)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 882,
            "text": "    ax.axvline(mean_val, color='red', linestyle='--', linewidth=1.5, label='Mean')"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 883,
            "text": "    ax.axvline"
          }
        ],
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 930
          },
          "startPosition": {
            "column": 16,
            "line": 817
          }

            "lineNumber": 51,

          {
            "lineNumber": 52,
            "text": "   \"source\": ["
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 53,
            "text": "    \"df = pd.read_csv(PANEL, low_memory=False)\\n\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 54,
            "text": "    \"print(\\\"rows\\\", len(df), \\\"cols\\\", list(df.columns))\\n\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 55,
            "text": "    \"\\n\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 56,
            "text": "    \"# v0 sample: drop missing LOO / outcome\\n\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 57,
            "text": "    \"use = df.dropna(subset=[\\\"poolq_loo\\\", \\\"Y_draft\\\"]).copy()\\n\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 58,
            "text": "    \"if MIN_MINUTES_V0 \u003e 0:\\n\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 59,
            "text": "    \"    use = use.loc[use[\\\"minutes\\\"] \u003e= MIN_MINUTES_V0]\\n\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 60,
            "text": "    \"print(\\\"after dropna(minutes if any)\\\", len(use))\\n\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 61,
            "text": "    \"print(\\\"Y_draft mean\\\", use[\\\"Y_draft\\\"].mean())\\n\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 62,
            "text": "    \"print(\\\"perf (LOO base) describe:\\\\n\\\", use[\\\"perf\\\"].describe())\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 63,
            "text": "   ]"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 64,
            "text": "  },"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 65,
            "text": "  {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 66,
            "text": "   \"cell_type\": \"code\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 67,
            "text": "   \"execution_count\": null,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 68,
            "text": "   \"id\": \"d4b6b5b7\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 69,
            "text": "   \"metadata\": {},"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 70,
            "text": "   \"outputs\": [],"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 71,
            "text": "   \"source\": ["
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 72,
            "text": "    \"# Ventiles on poolq_loo (duplicates='drop' if many ties)\\n\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 73,
            "text": "    \"try:\\n\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 74,
            "text": "    \"    use[\\\"vent\\\"] = pd.qcut(use[\\\"poolq_loo\\\"], q=VENTILES, labels=False, duplicates=\\\"drop\\\")\\n\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 75,
            "text": "    \"except ValueError as e:\\n\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 76,
            "text": "    \"    raise SystemExit(f\\\"qcut failed: {e} — try fewer ventiles or rank-based bins\\\") from e\\n\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 77,
            "text": "    \"\\n\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 78,
            "text": "    \"bin_tab = (\\n\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 79,
            "text": "    \"    use.groupby(\\\"vent\\\", observed=True)\\n\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 80,
            "text": "    \"    .agg(\\n\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 81,
            "text": "    \"        n=(\\\"Y_draft\\\", \\\"size\\\"),\\n\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 82,
            "text": "    \"        draft_rate=(\\\"Y_draft\\\", \\\"mean\\\"),\\n\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 83,
            "text": "    \"        poolq_mean=(\\\"poolq_loo\\\", \\\"mean\\\"),\\n\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 84,
            "text": "    \"    )\\n\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 85,
            "text": "    \"    .reset_index()\\n\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 86,
            "text": "    \"    .sort_values(\\\"vent\\\")\\n\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 87,
            "text": "    \")\\n\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 88,
            "text": "    \"csv_path = OUT_DIR / f\\\"binned_draft_rate_ventiles_{RUN_STAMP}.csv\\\"\\n\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 89,
            "text": "    \"bin_tab.to_csv(csv_path, index=False)\\n\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 90,
            "text": "    \"print(\\\"Wrote\\\", csv_path)\\n\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 91,
            "text": "    \"bin_tab.head()\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 92,
            "text": "   ]"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 93,
            "text": "  },"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 94,
            "text": "  {"
          },

            "lineNumber": 95,

            "lineNumber": 404,
            "text": "    ax0.legend(h0 + h1, l0 + l1, loc=\"upper left\", fontsize=7.5, framealpha=0.94, ncol=1)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 405
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 406,
            "text": "    _apply_analysis_window_shade(ax1, years, x, cfg)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 407,
            "text": "    ax1.fill_between("
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 408,

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 410,
            "text": "        alpha=0.25,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 411,
            "text": "        color=\"#16a085\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 412,
            "text": "        step=\"mid\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 413,
            "text": "    )"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 414,
            "text": "    ax1.plot("
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 415,
            "text": "        x,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 416,
            "text": "        detail[\"pct_overlap_of_box_minpos\"],"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 417,
            "text": "        label=\"SR match rate: BOX∩SR / BOX (min\u003e0)  [%]\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 418,
            "text": "        color=\"#0d6e5c\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 419,
            "text": "        lw=2.0,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 420,
            "text": "    )"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 421,
            "text": "    ax1.plot("
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 422,
            "text": "        x,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 423,
            "text": "        detail[\"pct_sr_bpm_of_box_any\"],"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 424,
            "text": "        label=\"SR athletes / BOX any game  [%]\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 425,

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 426,

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 427,

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 428,

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 429,
            "text": "    )"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 430,
            "text": "    ax1.set_ylabel(\"Percent\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 431,
            "text": "    _mx = float(np.nanmax(detail[\"pct_overlap_of_box_minpos\"].to_numpy(dtype=float)))"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 432,
            "text": "    if not np.isfinite(_mx):"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 433,
            "text": "        _mx = 0.0"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 434,
            "text": "    ax1.set_ylim(0, min(100.0, max(15.0, _mx * 1.15)))"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 435,
            "text": "    ax1.grid(True, axis=\"y\", alpha=0.25)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 436,
            "text": "    ax1.set_axisbelow(True)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 437,
            "text": "    ax1.legend(loc=\"upper left\", fontsize=8, framealpha=0.92)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 438
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 439,
            "text": "    step = 1 if len(years) \u003c= 28 else max(1, len(years) // 20)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 440,
            "text": "    tick_idx = np.arange(0, len(years), step, dtype=int)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 441,
            "text": "    for ax in (ax0, ax1):"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 442,
            "text": "        ax.set_xticks(x[tick_idx])"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 443,
            "text": "        ax.set_xticklabels([str(int(y)) for y in years[tick_idx]], rotation=45, ha=\"right\", fontsize=8)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 444,
            "text": "    ax1.set_xlabel(\"Year — BOX \u0026 SR = collegiate season; draft axis = June draft year\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 445
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 446,
            "text": "    fig.text("
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 447,
            "text": "        0.5,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 448,
            "text": "        0.01,"
          }
